programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: As the gang heads to Homecoming, some with sex on their mind, it becomes clear how everyone has (or hasn't) changed since Simone and Bryson's breakup.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: Going back to the day of Simon and Bryson's breakup, the gang gives their versions of what went down, revealing what they think of their friends and testing where their loyalties lie.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: The powers of influence are explored when social media star, Tia, lands a high-paying one-night gig at a strip club. David comes under the influence of a new megachurch.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: Bryson pushes past the acceptable limits of male intimacy when trying to talk about his experience at the barbershop. Ari considers the limitations of his sexuality and masculinity.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: Simone gathers the gang at her father's luxury beach house. Although meant to bring everyone together, it ends up highlighting how everyone is changing and possibly growing apart.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: To celebrate her new job Crystal takes a solo trip to Paris. Initially more interested in social media, she then finds adventure and romance without her phone.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: After a seven-day religious fast David enters a dream-like state where he follows the hero's journey to find God, so that he can get the answers he's been looking for.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: The gang questions whether things aren't the same as they used to be, and must come to terms with the fact that they've grown apart.

programme.title: Boomerang: Episode 1
programme.desc: New Age marketing professionals Bryson Broyer and Simone Graham look for ways to create their own paths to success while trying to renovate the legacy of their parents: The Graham Agency.

programme.title: Run's House: Camp Rev
programme.desc: Since Rev can't remember the last time Diggy and Russy had a sleepover, he requests that they invite their friends over for an unforgettable sleepover that Rev dubs "Camp Rev."

programme.title: Run's House: Who's Your Daddy?
programme.desc: While putting together her latest insert of Angela's Rundown, Angela discovers she has way too much content to fit into one sixteen-page insert. She and her crew at work discuss a full magazine.

programme.title: Run's House: Rock in Run's House
programme.desc: When Rev hears that his good friend Kid Rock is coming into town he invites him to stay at the house. Russy hopes that Kid will teach him how to play his guitar.

programme.title: Run's House: Baby Steps
programme.desc: Justine is babysitting her sister Michelle's eleven month old baby, Ameera, for two nights. The boys look forward to helping their mom baby-sit as long as they don't have to change diapers.

programme.title: Run's House: Mixed and Mastered
programme.desc: With their tracks finally mixed and mastered JoJo, Zach and Reggie, aka "Blackout," are ready to hit the streets and find a record deal.

programme.title: Run's House: Too Cool for Old School
programme.desc: To keep occupied while going to an engineer tech school in the city, JoJo begins an internship at Phat Farm to learn the family business.

programme.title: Run's House: When the Cat's Away...
programme.desc: Justine's Brown Sugar jewelry line is up and running. And better yet, the Home Shopping Network is interested in working with her. So it's off to sunny Tampa to put Justine's jewelry on air.

programme.title: Run's House: Slapped Silly
programme.desc: Every family has its pecking order and being the youngest sure has its drawbacks: like getting picked on, which makes Russy the target of his brothers and sisters annoyance.

programme.title: Run's House: Rev's Baby Girl
programme.desc: It's time for JoJo and his group, Blackout, to hit the studio and begin recording tracks for their record. However, JoJo, Zach and Reggie are discouraged by the list of producers Latchkey Recordings has available to them.

programme.title: Run's House: Baby Comes Home
programme.desc: Rev and Justine return from visiting their adopted baby they'll soon be able to call their own. They get the family excited with the news that they will have a new sister living in the house in a few days.

programme.title: Run's House: Mind on the Road
programme.desc: Season Five kicks off when Rev Run home for a short visit in between gigs of his concert tour with good pal, Kid Rock.

programme.title: Run's House: Bonless Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: The episode begins with Rev Run on stage in what is his final performance of his tour with Kid Rock. Rev returns home and his hopes of getting his diet back on track are thwarted by Russy's new cooking hobby.

programme.title: Run's House: Pass The Frame
programme.desc: With the final mix of their debut album just around the corner, Team Blackout takes the next step in their pursuit of ultimate rap dominance: self-promotion.

programme.title: Run's House: Outside The Box
programme.desc: Making the Honor Roll has been something Rev and Justine have come to expect from Diggy and Russy over the years. So when their latest report cards show them not making it, Rev confronts the boys about it.

programme.title: Run's House: Mole Beauty, Mole Problems
programme.desc: A trip to the orthodontist for Diggy and Russy brings the family some surprising news: That Russy will be getting his braces off before Diggy, who will have to wait another two months.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Just Say No
programme.desc: Joan continues to suffer in her troubled friendship with Toni and her new relationship with her therapist, Dr. Bales.

programme.title: Girlfriends: A Full Court Conspiracy
programme.desc: Torn between her two worlds, Joan struggles with her professional duty while at the same time dealing with the guilt that she is not being true to herself or her beliefs.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Un-Treatable
programme.desc: Maya buys a dress that is too expensive knowing it might cause problems with her husband, Darnell. Joan treats herself to a trip to New York to visit her boyfriend, realizing the distance between the two of them is a problem.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Buh-Bye
programme.desc: Joan ends the friendship between her and Toni after finding out that Toni has been discussing her personal life with co-workers behind her back. Meanwhile, Lynn is trying to cope with her new living situation with Vosco, and his lack of a job.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Willie or Won’t He
programme.desc: Yvonne is concerned that William is never going to marry her because they have not set a date for the wedding. When Yvonne asks Joan for advice, Joan tries her best to stay out of it but ends up telling Yvonne to move in with William first to try it out.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Blackout Episode
programme.desc: A guys' night out goes awry, resulting in lost recollections due to alcohol-fueled blackouts and the disappearance of Nick's wedding ring.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Wrong Way Episode
programme.desc: Nick attends his high-school reunion but must face an embarrassing incident from his past. Meanwhile, Lindsey throws a party.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Concussion Episode
programme.desc: Nick suffers a concussion.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Bucket List Episode
programme.desc: Nick worries about his mortality and creates a bucket list featuring overly dangerous activities. Meanwhile, Kevin and Troy launch an underground candy ring at school.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Spelling Bee Episode
programme.desc: Nick meets a famous actor, who shadows Nick in preparation for a role. Meanwhile, Kevin gears up for a spelling bee.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Kleptomaniac Episode
programme.desc: Nick is enlisted to host a charity walkathon. Meanwhile, Marilyn's bracelet goes missing, and the children train for their participation in the charity walk.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Hand on a House Episode
programme.desc: Nick and others enter a contest to win a house.
programme.sub-title: The Hand on a House Episode

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Good Day Seattle Episode
programme.desc: A new morning show is launched at the station, but Nick must cohost it with a self-serving reality star. Meanwhile, Marilyn moves in with the family.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Hyphenated Name Episode
programme.desc: A newlywed couple (Terry Crews, Essence Atkins) with two children face various blended-family obstacles in this sitcom based on the 2005 film of the same name.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Credit Check Episode
programme.desc: Cash-flow problems strike the family when Suzanne's credit issues surface and Nick's work necessitates a new van.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Get Out of This House
programme.desc: When an aggressive spirit stalks a young family, PRS is called in to investigate. When it is determined that the source of the haunting may have been unknowingly invited in, Ryan races to identify and hopefully defeat the entity before it's too late.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Messenger
programme.desc: Kelli and her husband Riley are frightened in their coastal Oregon home. They are plagued by a headless apparition and often hear mysterious noises that resemble cries for help from the dark corners of their house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lady Vampire
programme.desc: PRS investigates a case involving single mom, Dawn, and her 5-year-old daughter, both of whom are tormented by the appearance of a hag they call "lady vampire."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fury
programme.desc: Kathy, her two daughters and her new husband, "Farmer" thought they had the perfect, quiet life deep in the mountains of West Virginia.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Boy Pushed Me
programme.desc: Bruce and Danielle are terrified by an EVP recorded in their Indiana home stating "Kill them." Even more chilling, their toddler son survived a fall out of a window only to tell his parents, "Boy pushed me."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Man
programme.desc: A grieving mother suspects her deceased son may have fallen victim to a mysterious entity called The Dark Man.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Anniversary
programme.desc: Ever since a close-knit Kentucky family moved into their new home, they've been visited by the spirit of a young girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Intervention
programme.desc: Carol Ann stays awake every night taping the voices of the dead. PRS cuts their winter break short to help her curtail her obsession and close this doorway to the dead--for good.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room & Board
programme.desc: The owners of a vacation lodge in the remote town of North Hudson, NY, feel their woodsy getaway is plagued by negative spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Sixth Sense
programme.desc: A worried mother calls the Paranormal Research Society to help her son Matthew, a boy who sees dead people. Matthew's story strikes a chord with team leader Ryan Buell who also experienced paranormal activity as a child.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Freshmen Fear
programme.desc: A young female student claims to have seen a ghost in her dorm room.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Permission To Do Harm
programme.desc: When a mirror levitates and shatters on its own, P.R.S. heeds the call to investigate a spirit that has been unleashed on an unsuspecting family. Ryan must track down the spirit and contain it before it does irreparable damage.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: When Paula's young autistic son Michael, with limited verbal skills uttered the words "Go away scary dead boy" -- it sent a chill up her spine.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Devil in Syracuse
programme.desc: The clients are new, but the spirit is all too familiar as Ryan Buell prepares himself to battle the taunting demon that has been following him.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Supernatural Seduction
programme.desc: PRS investigates the Campbell House, where the Innkeeper and guests claim to have sexual encounters with a spirit who has deep ties to a family tragedy.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room 37
programme.desc: Darrell and Cherry, the owners of an historic Tennessee bed and breakfast built in the late 1800s, are reporting apparitions of a man and hearing whistling throughout the hotel corridors.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Sex Dungeon
programme.desc: Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey and Chad Calek join PRS for this unusual case of a sprawling mansion on Greyhaven Island near Detroit. Ken, the owner, hears voices and banging and it has him feeling both watched and cursed; a prisoner in his own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: They Only Come Out at Night
programme.desc: Once night falls in a quaint?New England Town, a police officer's family is terrorized by demons.?PRS arrives just in time with the family ready to vacate their family home, rather than suffer the advances of these spirit creatures.
programme.sub-title: They Only Come Out at Night

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage
programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Hillary and her nine-year-old son Hunter are being harassed by a shadow presence in their Victorian home in Newburgh, Indiana. Trap doors in the basement reveal artifacts from a bygone era, and the clients have recorded persistent strange noises.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Smoke and Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah believes her Parkville, MD home has been invaded by a powerful force ever since her roommate Dennis moved in. PRS investigates claims that Dennis has been attacked by the entity, a possible poltergeist.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Haunted Piano
programme.desc: Ryan and the PRS team are called in when unlucky antique collectors unwittingly bring a paranormally-infested piano into their home. The team attempts to dismantle and destroy the offending instrument.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Basement
programme.desc: A history of violence may connect the spiritual activity in Heidi's Ohio home to a long run of misery and cruelty.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shape Shifter
programme.desc: PRS travels to Shapleigh, Maine where a woman and her daughter are reporting attacks from a winged creature with sharp teeth. Psychic Chip Coffey arrives and senses a half-human, half animal presence.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Mothman
programme.desc: Ryan takes his team to Point Pleasant, West Virginia to investigate his own personal holy grail of paranormal lore: the mysterious Mothman.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Southern Discomfort At Sweetwater Mansion
programme.desc: PRS heads to the Deep South to investigate a haunted Antebellum Mansion in disrepair. The caretaker and volunteers at the property have many a tale to tell of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jimmie is haunted by the apparition of a mysterious old woman who peers at him in the bathroom of his family's Petersburg, VA home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Beer, Wine and Spirits
programme.desc: Brian's bar has a cranky customer who's got a bad habit of breaking wine glasses. Charlie has been dead since prohibition.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hostage to Fear
programme.desc: P.R.S. is summoned to help a family who has been haunted for years by spirits lurking in the house. Upon arrival the team finds a family that has become prisoners in their own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Get Out of This House
programme.desc: When an aggressive spirit stalks a young family, PRS is called in to investigate. When it is determined that the source of the haunting may have been unknowingly invited in, Ryan races to identify and hopefully defeat the entity before it's too late.

programme.title: Paranormal State: I Am Six
programme.desc: Laura has felt oppressed by a violent spirit ever since she heard a chilling EVP in the fall of 2007. The 26-year-old claims she's been beaten, choked, even forcibly submerged.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison Pt2
programme.desc: With Karl in the main prison block, Stuart checks out the isolation unit, with dramatic results.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Shire Hall P1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the courtroom of one of Dorchester’s most historical buildings and is suddenly surrounded by unexplained occurrences.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Shire Hall P2
programme.desc: Under the main building of Dorchester Shire Hall there is a warren of tunnels and cells. Stuart enters this area that is said to house many a phantom.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Dudley Castle
programme.desc: The ruins that make up Dudley Castle house a plethora of paranormal activity for Yvette and her team to investigate. Strange noises and a violent poltergeist await them as they turn the lights out and do battle with the unseen forces.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Eden Camp Museum
programme.desc: Once a prison camp during WWII, Eden Camp is now a museum housing many an artefact and many a ghost. Karl enters the cottage to face the spirits that are said to haunt this once family home.

programme.title: EXCLUSIVE TO PLUTO TV Most Haunted S25: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding leads her team in a two-part investigation at the foreboding Gloucester Prison, one of Britain's most haunted places, known for its history of death, fear, pain, suicide, and incarceration

programme.title: EXCLUSIVE TO PLUTO TV Most Haunted S25: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt2
programme.desc: The second part of Yvette Fielding and the team's investigation of the imposing and abandoned Gloucester Prison.

programme.title: EXCLUSIVE TO PLUTO TV Most Haunted S25: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt3
programme.desc: The third part of Yvette Fielding and the team's investigation into the very haunted and abandoned Gloucester Prison. With the team splitting up the activity rises and something is trying to stop Yvette and Glen.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gloucester Prison P1
programme.desc: There are many ghost said to haunt Gloucester Prison, from the passive to the most aggressive and as Stuart enters the segregation block he soon fears for his life.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gloucester Prison P1
programme.desc: HMP Gloucester is a houses a huge selection of buildings, Karl investigates one block where spirits are said to make themselves known on a regular basis.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gloucester Prison P2
programme.desc: Some places, just by their name, instill fear into those who hear it, Gloucester Prison is such a lace and Karl investigates the main cell block in an evening he will never forget.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gloucester Prison P2
programme.desc: The education block of HMP Gloucester is an eerie set of corridors and empty rooms. Stuart enters for the first time and gradually realises that something is there with him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the very haunted school room in the large imposing Gressenhall Workhouse. The activity starts even before Karl gets into the building and becomes one of the most impressive investigations to date.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt2
programme.desc: Stuart investigates two buildings, a forge and the cottage. He could not have imagined the activity that unfolded around him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Guys Cliffe House Pt1
programme.desc: The formidable visage of Guys Cliff House, a once great home, is awe inspiring, as are the stories pf paranormal activity within. Now home to the Masonic fraternity it is home to two temples and many lodges and chapters.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Guys Cliffe House Pt2
programme.desc: The lower Temple in this once great, but now ruined castle, is steeped in history and tales pf ghostly happenings. Stuart investigates a room that is said to house multiple spirits and feels something is watching him in the dark.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hack Green Bunker
programme.desc: Gregg enters the bunker for the first time and feels its energy. Has he caught the voice of the mysterious woman that some believe was murdered there?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hack Green Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: Karl and Stuart head to Hack Green Bunker and witness, first hand, the paranormal activity that regularly occurs there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hack Green Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: Yvette and Glen: Built on ancient ground, Hack Green Nuclear Bunker is a hot spot for paranormal activity. Yvette and Glen go it alone and soon experience the bunkers reputation first-hand.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Haden Hill House Part 1
programme.desc: An old house in England’s West Midlands gives the Most Haunted team a night they will never forget.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Haden Hill House Part 2
programme.desc: The strange occurrences at Hayden Hill House switch up a gear as whatever is there seems now to be stalking the team with some terrifying results, at least for some of the crew it is proving too much.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hickleton Hall
programme.desc: Once a grand mansion, this huge property is now very much passed it previous grandeur. Stuart investigates the long empty corridors alone and something seems to be following him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Song for Jason - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are helping patients at Camp Good Times in different ways. But a father still refuses to deal with his son's illness.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Bless the Boys in Blue
programme.desc: Jonathan relinquishes his angelic powers for awhile and realizes the dangers that Mark has faced being a police officer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Cindy
programme.desc: An aspiring actress wants to be accepted for who she really is, not in the image her well-meaning dad tries to transform her into.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Devil and Jonathan Smith
programme.desc: Mark has been tricked into selling his soul in order to save a little girl's life. But the Devil has another agenda: acquiring Jonathan's soul.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Factory workers ignore ground-water contamination, even though it is making their children sick. As a result, Jonathan takes drastic measures to force them to face the facts.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Popcorn, Peanuts and Crackerjacks
programme.desc: A minor-league baseball team never wins, so Jonathan and Mark set out to help them. They also come to the aid of an elderly vendor who has been kicked out of the stadium.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Smile in the Third Row
programme.desc: The lead actor in a Broadway play claims that God is attending the show's performances, sitting in a third-row orchestra seat.
programme.sub-title: The Smile in the Third Row

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Secret
programme.desc: The teenage daughter of Mark's friend tries to find her biological mother. It may tear the family apart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Monster - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark connect a young blind woman with a disfigured artist.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Monster - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's friend Scotty is on hand to provide legal assistance. He defends the young artist with a facial deformity who has been accused of assaulting a blind girl.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark go to work at a football team. They learn that one of the players has been getting drugs from the team doctor.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Alone
programme.desc: A homeless boy wishes that someone would love him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Close Encounters of the Heavenly Kind
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help a bullied orphan whose eccentric grandfather is in danger of losing him to a heartless social worker.
programme.sub-title: Close Encounters of the Heavenly Kind

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Change of Life
programme.desc: Mark switches places with an attractive movie star who has a low opinion of men.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Keep Smiling
programme.desc: Jonathan must help his own widow regain her love for life.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Last Assignment
programme.desc: An errant angel has been on probation for two centuries because he's always breaking the rules.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Bind the Wounds
programme.desc: A father attempts to have a memorial made to commemorate his son who was killed in Vietnam.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Heaven on Earth
programme.desc: Mark asks Jonathan to help erase everything bad that's happened to him recently. Mark's idea is to create his own vision of heaven on Earth.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: It's the grand reopening of Mara and a British wildlife charity is using the event to release a vulture back into the wild. Fatani, the new, young and ambitious manager of Mara has hired Danny as the vet to oversee the release.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: Leopard's Den is looking after a sick and orphaned baby elephant called Togo. However, despite Evan and Du Plessis' constant vigil, Togo is dying from a broken heart. Evan is distraught and Du Plessis promises they will look after her together.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Sarah's absence couldn't have come at a worse time for Leopard's Den. Nature Conservation is carrying out their annual inspection and everything has to be tip top. Danny's determined they pass with flying colours and everyone is roped in to help.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Everyone's excited at the prospect of Leopard's Den's new arrival. Bash, Danny's old tutor and Rosie's Godfather, is coming from England to help Danny grow his veterinary practice.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: The Trevanions are delighted when Fatani asks Danny to take an aggressive hippo off his hands. As they prepare for its arrival Sarah gets a bit of a shock when her mother Caroline beats the hippo to the post.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Business is looking up at Leopard's Den but Sarah is feeling agitated. Caroline thinks it because Simon, her ex husband and Evan and Olivia's Dad, is arriving from England to get married. But Sarah has other things on her mind.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Danny is undertaking a drugs trial at Leopard's Den. But de-worming wildebeest isn't Caroline's idea of fun. She hates animals and finds the whole business mind-numbingly boring.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: Du Plessis is in a foul mood. It's his 60th birthday and he has no intentions of celebrating it. But the Trevanions have other ideas and Caroline is organising a surprise party.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: All is quiet at Leopard's Den as Sarah, Evan and Olivia gather at the hospital. Danny has been given the all clear to go home. But Du Plessis is still unconscious and seriously ill. Caroline keeps a tender vigil at his bedside.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: New lodges nearly break the family, but they learn that it's the animals which make Leopard's Den a success.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Danny needs an assistant but fails to see that she's right under his nose; Sarah finds out that she needs her mum.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: Leopard's Den expands and DuPlessis becomes a grandfather after a close-call with an angry elephant.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Danny and Sarah let their past catch up with them, and Caroline and DuPlessis go shopping for lion-prey.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: A white lion brings mixed fortunes to the family and Rosie is asked the big question. Amy Kriel is the last person you expect in Africa.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: Caroline's sister Judith tries to help and the drought forces Danny to sell some of his animals. Will Rosie and Max get married?

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: The drought finally throws up a fire and the wedding turns into a firefight for everyone. The omens are bad.

programme.title: Wild At Heart
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes and the Trevanians have to decide what future lies ahead of them in these difficult times.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: It's a year since we left Leopard's Den and much has changed. The animal hospital has been rebuilt and is now up and running. It's a big day for all the family as Danny has been fighting for custody of Evan and today they will learn the judge's decision.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Danny and Evan's life on the run doesn't start well when Danny falls asleep at the wheel and drives into a ditch. They have to enlist a local farmer, Johann, to winch them out.

programme.desc: Binge on the international pop culture phenomenon Bridezillas and satisfy your inner beauty monster. Follow brides on their tumultuous journeys leading up to the big day.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: #1 Suspect
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda must somehow solve a stranger-on-stranger crime with just a composite sketch of the killer and a mysterious bouquet of flowers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: River of Blood
programme.desc: Two hunters discover a blood-drenched car, its owner riddled with buckshot. Lt. Joe Kenda learns the car was reported stolen the day before, he follows its trail to a group of unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Make My Day
programme.desc: When Keith Andrews is killed, a man steps forward claiming he did it in self-defense—but Lt. Joe Kenda has his doubts.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: 24yr old Lorraine Laribo is dropped off at a bar by her sister's boyfriend. It's the last time anyone would ever see her alive again. Kenda must use his interrogation skills to find her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb
programme.desc: In 1978, Lt. Joe Kenda is new to the CSPD, and gets more than he bargains for when a local bank is the target of a massive explosion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Chance Encounter
programme.desc: When firefighters find Victor Woods stabbed to death in his burning apartment, homicide detective Joe Kenda tracks Colorado's most notorious serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Pop Goes the Witness
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Willie McCarty is found at the base of a staircase. Neighbors direct Kenda to a truck spotted fleeing the scene, but a surprise visitor at CSPD turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead On Target
programme.desc: A young father-to-be is shot dead in broad daylight by a single bullet fired from afar. At the crime scene, Kenda recognizes the hallmark of a skilled sniper.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead Weight
programme.desc: A seemingly random attack leaves Mary Moebus dead, and police flummoxed by a daunting field of suspects. But when Lt Joe Kenda uncovers a cache of new evidence, he realizes someone’s been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William’s circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: When a soon-to-be grandmother doesn’t come home from work and the investigation unfolds, Lt. Joe Kenda realizes they could be dealing with a fledgling serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Hail of Bullets
programme.desc: The murder of a young father stuns his close-knit community, but the investigation reveals a neighborly dispute turned deadly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Worst Fear
programme.desc: Police are shocked to find a 13-year-old boy killed in an explosion, but their grief turns to alarm when they discover a second, unexploded bomb.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Calvin, Rudy, and Milo
programme.desc: A ridgeback mix needs help recovering from a car accident that left him with three-legs; a manic Jack Russell chases motorcycles; and a border collie's herding instincts are out of control.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: India, Jagger, and Axl
programme.desc: A Manchester Terrier attacks family members, bikes, skateboards, and visiting guests. Jagger needs to learn how to take a walk without wreaking havoc. Cesar tries to rehabilitate an ocean-phobic dog.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Lotus Blossoms
programme.desc: A jealous dachshund learns to get along with both of his owners. Can Cesar exorcize a demon possessed German Shepherd that prevents his people from entering certain rooms of the house.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: The Dark Side of Chipper
programme.desc: Chipper, a 2-month old Ridgeback/Boxer mix has become progressively more aggressive and has attacked 5 dogs. Two Whippets, Rudy and Monte, are causing issues at their owner’s place of business.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Stanley, Shoven and Leo
programme.desc: Stanley, a surly Chihuahua mix, has a problem with attacking joggers. Two Pomeranians are known for their shrill barks. Shelter rescue Leo, performs a tight rope act when hearing a cough.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Viper and Diesel
programme.desc: Viper, a trained K9 detection dog is unable to enter a prison because of his fear of strangers. Family dog, Diesel, took a turn for the worse when his canine companion, Chopper, passed away.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bear & Angel and Lorelei
programme.desc: Two German Shepherds develop an aggressive relationship when they begin going to day care. Then a miniature Schnauzer begins to bark and nip at her owner’s grandchildren.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Greta & Hoss, Storm, and Chula
programme.desc: Cesar helps a young Akita control his aggression; Newfoundland is the world's pickiest eater; two-year old Shiba Inu has a knack for bolting out open doors.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Woof and Wheels
programme.desc: People and their dogs descended on a local PETCO to meet producers in the hopes of a session with Cesar Millan. Meet two of the problem pooches. Can Cesar dial down the bad behavior of these terrors?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar Down Under
programme.desc: Paul Watson can't stop his great Dane, from biting at him. Andrea and Adrian avoid taking their Bearded Collie to the dog park because of her. Cesar travels down under to tame them.
programme.sub-title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar Down Under

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Brady, Bandit, and Hootie
programme.desc: Water-obsessed Labrador; a pooch with performance anxiety; a leg chomping Chihuahua.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Power of the Pack
programme.desc: The pack is a vital tool. In this intimate and revealing episode, witness some of the most memorable moments and experience the power of the pack.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Army Brats
programme.desc: At an army base, Cesar helps an Australian shepherd scared of men in uniform and a Shetland shepherd who barks non-stop when planes fly overhead.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Snickers and Maury
programme.desc: After being attacked by another dog, Snickers has become aggressive with both dogs and humans. Can previously unadoptable Maury get a second chance?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bella, Rocky and Madison & Catalina
programme.desc: A Chihuahua adds chaos in a previously peaceful home. A boy tries to avoid ankle attacks from his terrier. A five-legged mini Pinscher has found his perfect home, but needs to curb his biting.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: A Dog and his Boy; Mobile Vet
programme.desc: Vet Dr. Rick Garcia, needs Cesar’s help with some high maintenance patients. An 11 month old Siberian Husky must learn how to be a member of the family.
programme.sub-title: A Dog and his Boy; Mobile Vet

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hank & Paris
programme.desc: Marsha Alexander’s rescued Mastiff has ruined the furniture and intimidates anyone walking by his gate. Paris, a long hair Chihuahua, looks fashionable, but barks and snaps at strangers.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Isis & Tina, Nugget, and the Katrina Dogs
programme.desc: Traumatized canine victims of Hurricane Katrina are rehabilitated; a couple's dogs finally meet; a big dog's dangerous appetite for toys, towels and trampolines.
programme.sub-title: Isis & Tina, Nugget, and the Katrina Dogs

programme.title: I Am Not A Serial Killer
programme.desc: In a small Midwestern town, a troubled teen with homicidal tendencies must hunt down and destroy a supernatural killer while keeping his own inner demons at bay.

programme.title: Dead Rising Watchtower
programme.desc: When a zombie virus outbreak throws a city into chaos, a trio of survivors must work together to develop an arsenal of makeshift zombie-slaying weaponry - battling their way through rampaging hordes, vicious gangs and hostile government operatives.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Theres more to Dracula than just Bela Lugosi, as the cinemas various incarnations of the carnal count are examined.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Dracula wasnt the only blood-sucker immortalized on film. Here is some of his competition.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Karloffs career was defined by his sympathetic portrayal of the monster, but others took on this challenging role over the years.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Hammer Films reanimated the Frankenstein franchise in the 1950s with its terrifying teaming of Peter Cushing and Christopher Lee.

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre The Werewolf of Washington
programme.desc: While on assignment in Hungary, a young reporter is attacked by a mysterious animal. (1981)

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Robert Louis Stevensons classic tale of good and evil has been a filmic favorite since early silent days. Various portrayals of the dual doctor are examined.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Of course theres Lon Chaney Jr. as The Wolf Man, but other films have featured werewolves in surprising ways over the years.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Lugosi was much more than Count Dracula, as youll see in this fascinating salute to this complex Hungarian actor.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Silver Curtain
programme.desc: Behind the "silver curtain" spray from a fountain, a man is found dead with a knife in his back. Colonel March is called in to investigate.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Error At Daybreak
programme.desc: A shady businessman collapses on an oceanside jetty, the apparent victim of a heart attack, but March discovers blood and a needle near the body.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Hot Money
programme.desc: After a bank robbery, the suspect, never out of sight, goes to his office where he locks himself in. But when the police search, there is no money!

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Missing Link
programme.desc: A skull, known as the Damascus man, is stolen from a museum and Colonel March's life is imperiled trying to solve the case.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Misguided Missal
programme.desc: A 15th century prayer volume disappears from a sealed casket inside a locked safe belonging to an Oxford Don; the supernatural is suspected.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: The Dark Oracle comic returns with a vengeance and the Stone twins, Cally and Lance are more at risk than ever.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: The comic predicts that a red sports car will get into a terrible accident and when Cally's new crush, Emmett shows up at school with the very same car, Cally is horrified.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: Evil Sage has taken real Sage's place and Lance and Cally are shocked when this new, uncensored Sage devastates Lance by hooking up with Vern.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: Lance is playing an online role-playing game 24/7 and even Dizzy thinks he's out of control. A staged intervention fails utterly and Lance is back at the keyboard.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: Lance and Cally find themselves the unwitting hosts of a house party that goes completely out of control.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: When the comic predicts that Dizzy will become a rock star, the "Dister" surprises everyone by entering a local "Canadian Idol" type contest.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: When Vern decides to use his expertise in the dark arts to grow his own "familiar", Cally and Lance use the comic clues to find it before the it hatches.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: Succumbing to temptation, Lance joins a group of older kids in a midnight graveyard game only to place himself, Cally and Sage in great danger.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Theres more to Dracula than just Bela Lugosi, as the cinemas various incarnations of the carnal count are examined.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Toot Goes Bollywood
programme.desc: Therapy unearths a repressed memory from Foxxy's past. Xandir gives Toot a makeover.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Breakfast Food Killer
programme.desc: Becoming a breakfast cereal mascot leads Wooldoor to fame and Crunch Berries addiction.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Wanda Sykes & Sarah Silverman
programme.desc: Murray complains about a traumatic restaurant experience, and Hadassah needs cooking advice on a special night.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Tracy Morgan & Jimmy Kimmel
programme.desc: Birchum has an insect problem, and Spoonie Luv promotes his homemade porn videos.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Ludacris & Kevin Nealon
programme.desc: Hadassah interviews an NFL quarterback for a teen magazine, and Ludacris needs some security.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Holiday Special
programme.desc: Elmer complains about a tree, and Hadassah shops for Santas.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Lil Jon & Sarah Silverman
programme.desc: Lil Jon looks to hire a harpist for his tour, and Hadassah tries to recover her half-full juice from the mall.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Jimmy Kimmel & Steve-O
programme.desc: Steve-O wants to set a world record in skydiving, and Mark Thomas reports a computer virus.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Dane Cook & Chamillionaire
programme.desc: Chamillionaire is threatened with legal action by the lawyer of "Chabillionaire," and Maverick complains about the outcome of a fish fight.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Good Charlotte & Lil Jon
programme.desc: Dr. Premise looks for an assistant to help him with scientific experiments, and Hadassah tries to find something to do in Arlington.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Dave Chappelle & Seth Green
programme.desc: Francis orders some insulting customized trophies for his basketball team and Elmer is upset at the sight of a bus driven by a woman.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Andy Milonakis & Ryan Dunn
programme.desc: Terrence calls a Catholic Church on behalf of Paris Hilton, and Wayne McClammy has a lengthy request for a tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Friends for Dinner
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have been invited to Neil and Moira's for dinner, or so they think.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Mastermind
programme.desc: When Bob and Margaret have a fender-bender with a local mobster, they accidentally turn him into the police.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Book Club
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret join a book club in the hopes of expanding their tiny social horizon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Gone to Seed
programme.desc: Bob decides to donate his sperm to a local sperm bank.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Tale of Two Dentists
programme.desc: Bob's business is booming, and when Margaret chips a tooth Bob tells Margaret that he is unable to give her an appointment for sometime.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Night In
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret find themselves at loose ends one evening when, to their dismay, they find that there is absolutely nothing to watch on TV.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Strangers in a Strange Land
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret are mortified to discover that while they have been cooped up at Cookie and Melvin's house in Mississauga Ontario, their dogs have been left unattended by Penny, Bob's unreliable receptionist.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Very Fishy Christmas
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret experience a truly Canadian Christmas.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Blood, Sweat and Tears
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret decide they need to get fit.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob Gets Wired
programme.desc: When Margaret forgets to pay for some sprinkles at the local cake shop, she is hauled in as a shoplifter.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Trouble with Mummy
programme.desc: Bob is concerned when he hears that his mother's best friend Pearl has passed on.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Driving Bob
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have put it off for too long. They need to get their Canadian drivers' licenses.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Cuckoo in the Nest
programme.desc: When Bobs old friend Clive, (who is a real drunken slob), is dumped by his wife, Bob lets him stay for a few days despite Margaret's objections?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: On Location
programme.desc: A film crew sets up shop on Bob and Margaret's street, giving them a small and unsavory taste of fame and fortune.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Neighbours
programme.desc: In this story of neighbourhood social angst, Bob is having a complex burglar alarm installed by Graham, a sad, lonely man whose confidence is lifted immeasurably by this rare sale to Bob.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob's Burglary
programme.desc: While Bob and Margaret are sleeping, the local criminals, Beany and Boney clear their house - TV, video, microwave and electric toothbrush all go.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Party Politics
programme.desc: Margaret runs into a distant friend who asks her to have an Ann Summers-type party in her home.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Player
programme.desc: Bob attends a personal finance seminar to help him get his hopeless financial house in order.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Life Saver
programme.desc: Bob inadvertently saves the life of a suicidal man who then decides to become Bob's best friend.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair
programme.desc: When a patient dies of natural causes while in Bob's surgery, the local papers pick up the story?
programme.sub-title: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Dental Convention
programme.desc: The time for the annual dental convention has come. Bob is not keen on going when he sees that a colleague from his student days, Bernard Wiggins, a "loud mouthed big shot", is a featured speaker.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Bob or Two
programme.desc: Bob buys an inexpensive painting from the neighbours at a junk sale (mostly motivated by pity since these neighbours have fallen on hard times) and hangs it in his surgery to brighten things up?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Fly on the Wall
programme.desc: Feeling belittled by his family, Bob jumps at the chance to be the subject of a fly on the wall documentary.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret arrive home from another boring evening out with dreary friends, to find that their dogs behaviour has taken a turn for the worse?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Til Death Do Us
programme.desc: Bob gets conned into buying a cemetery plot for Margaret as a surprise 15th wedding anniversary gift.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Outward Bound
programme.desc: Bob joins his male colleagues on a canoe trip to a provincial park.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: My Foot Hurts
programme.desc: Margaret gets her own local call-in radio show entitled My Foot Hurts. On the first day, nervous and short on callers, she mentions her favourite curry house on the air?

programme.title: On the Case: Crossed by Evil
programme.desc: Police race to find a young woman who disappeared on her way to work, but the clues they discover reveal a trail of unspeakable evil.

programme.title: On the Case: Long Sought Truth
programme.desc: Sunday December 3rd, 1978. A motorist walked into the empty office of a Palmdale, California gas station and stumbled upon the aftermath of a violent robbery. Even more chilling was the fact that station's attendant was nowhere to be found.

programme.title: On the Case: Trapped by Lies
programme.desc: Before police can catch a depraved killer of a 15 year old girl, they must first unravel a puzzling series of lies.

programme.title: On the Case: Mixed Signals
programme.desc: Cell phone records may help solve the disturbing murder of a popular teenager.

programme.title: On the Case: Terror in Bedford Park
programme.desc: A young woman is found stabbed to death locked inside a locker at a storage facility.

programme.title: On the Case: No One To Trust
programme.desc: A beautiful young girl vanishes on a desolate stretch of highway. Could the man in charge of the investigation be responsible?

programme.title: On the Case: The Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: Two boys witness the brutal murder of their mother, and their story may bring her cold-blooded killer to justice 30 years later.

programme.title: On the Case: A Predator in Deerfield
programme.desc: March 17, 1986 in Deerfield Beach, Florida 5- year-old Stacy Savage happily bounded up the street to the spot where her mother Angela Savage and her little brother met her after school. But when Stacy got there, her mother was nowhere to be found

programme.title: On the Case: A Dream Shattered
programme.desc: When a young teacher fails to show up for work, her principal goes looking for her at her home, where he makes a shocking discovery. The case would go cold until DNA technology helps police track down her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Dirty Secrets
programme.desc: How did seventeen year old Joanna Rogers disappear from her home in the middle of the night? It was a question that baffled the investigators in Lubbock, TX. The mystery may have never been solved without the evidence found during another brutal murder...

programme.title: On the Case: Kidnapped on the 4th of July
programme.desc: When a young woman's pizza delivery car is found abandoned in the middle of the desolate stretch of road, a twenty three year mystery begins.

programme.title: On the Case: Long Walk, Cold Night
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found murdered after a night out with friend, Police must retrace her final steps to find her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Screams for Justice
programme.desc: The eyewitness accounts of neighbors may help or hinder investigators as they seek to solve the murder of a young woman.

programme.title: On the Case: A Betrayal Concealed
programme.desc: A 17-year-old's shocking murder shatters the peace in a small town and destroys her family.

programme.title: On the Case: Unthinkable Harm
programme.desc: When a teenager is found savagely stabbed to death in her home, police hope a trail of blood found at the crime scene will lead them to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: What Happened to Sarah
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl's mysterious runaway note raises difficult questions for police. Had she really left home on her own or had someone close to her pieced together writing from her journals to cover up an unthinkable crime.

programme.title: On the Case: A Blue Raincoat
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears on her way home from school, police find her blue raincoat thirty miles away. It marks the beginning of a heartbreaking homicide investigation.

programme.title: On the Case: Racing to Justice
programme.desc: A talented chef's abduction is the impetus for what will turn out to be a chilling homicide investigation.

programme.title: On the Case: Terrifying Connections
programme.desc: When a 15-year-old boy vanished under mysterious circumstances police feared the worst. It appeared the case had terrifying connections to a serial killer who had left a trail of bloodshed across the region.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Memories
programme.desc: A hypnotist who specializes in helping people relive their past lives tries to find her own history. She hypnotizes herself and when she awakens, she learns that everyone can now remember their past lives. They also desperately want to forget them.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: The Hellgramite Method
programme.desc: An alcoholic goes through an extremely painful and potentially deadly cure for his drinking problem. He has to choose which is more important - the bottle or his life.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Our Selina is Dying
programme.desc: A young woman, Debra, comes to live with her mysterious family, including the dying patriarch Selena. After Selena clutches Debra's hand firmly leaving an odd spot on it, Debra begins to age very fast while Selena rejuvenates.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: The Call
programme.desc: A lonely man accidentally phones the wrong number and finds an intriguing female to whom he grows attached. When she refuses to meet him, he investigates and finds the phone in a museum next to the statue of a woman.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: The Trance
programme.desc: A scam artist purports to channel the spirit of Delos, a former inhabitant of Atlantis. Together with a partner, he makes a living off of it.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Acts of Terror
programme.desc: A woman terrorized by her abusive husband finds some small consolation in a statue of a dog given to her by her sympathetic sister

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Twenty-Twenty Vision
programme.desc: Newly promoted bank loan officer Warren Cribbens cracks his eyeglasses and discovers he can see the future through them. Faced with seeing the future of the farmers whose farms he must foreclose on, Warren can't bring himself to foreclose.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: There Was an Old Woman
programme.desc: A writer of children's books gives a book to a sick young fan. Later, she starts hearing the sound of children in her house.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: The Trunk
programme.desc: A young man at a motel discovers an empty trunk that grants any wishes. He uses it for popularity, but at a party he discovers who his true friends are.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Appointment on route 17
programme.desc: After finishing a heart transplant, a man finds his personality has changed. He also discovers that he has a strange attraction to a waitress at a road diner.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Rebirth (REDUX)
programme.desc: Percy emerges from hyperspace without Dante or Luc to discover that 15 years have passed. When Percy tries to take legal possession of the Trans-Utopian, she runs into conflict with a starhunter, who is revealed as her cousin Travis, now much older.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Star Crossed (REDUX)
programme.desc: Travis and Callie are hired by the Jup-Fed to arrest Dakkota 79, a Raider leader on the verge of starting a war with the Verran Clan. Rudolfo's inquiry into a possible bounty on Travis leads to complications with his new crewmates.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Biocrime (REDUX)
programme.desc: Travis is hired to apprehend Father Abode, a former student of Dr. Novak, who has been producing genetic mutants for the sexual pleasure of wealthy clients. The chase reveals dark information about Marcus's past.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Chasing Janus (REDUX)
programme.desc: During a 'sting' operation, Callie is critically wounded. The crew of the Tulip race against the clock to track down her powerful family, who may have the means to save her.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Sidney inherits from the best relic hunter of the previous generation a key and rushes with Nigel on the hunt for the one treasure he never found: Pandora's box.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Warlord
programme.desc: Bekkastan, 1401 AD: warrior princess Kahina proves her right to rule. 2002: Sydney and Nigel unearth a cave painting that might lead them to Kahina's Saddle. But her descendants cause complications.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: While Nigel rehearses his keynote speech in a Seville hotel room, a girl nearly breaks his nose demanding something - it turns out she was after the water from the Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Arthur's Cross
programme.desc: Scotland Yard calls Sidney and Nigel to identify a 5th century murder weapon. It turns out to be the burial cross of King Arthur, but besides the victim several others are looking for it.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: So Shall It Be
programme.desc: When Sidney and Nigel are about to enter the site of a Bristol lecture, a young author approaches them to follow up immediately on a tip about a map to the lost keys to the druid cult in Stonehenge.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Buddha's Bowl
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Nepal to recover Buddha's fabled overflowing alms bowl for villagers who are building a shrine to the original Buddha.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Headless Nun
programme.desc: When Sydney's plane crashes, she's asked by a group of nuns to find the head of another nun who was decapitated several centuries ago.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Smoking Gun
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel search for Al Capone's diamond-encrusted gun at the behest of a man hoping it will clear his grandfather of a murder he was framed for.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Affaire de Coeur
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to Scotland to find the second ring of the pair of Twining Rings of Calum and Elena.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Thank You Very Much
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to Germany to find a lost Elvis Presley guitar.

programme.title: Making A Monster: Aileen Wuornos
programme.desc: "Dr Jethro Toomer did the original psychological assessmentof Aileen Wuonros after she confessed to the murders of 7 men. He reveals theshocking details of her upbringing that sowedthe seeds of her destruction as a human being."

programme.title: Making A Monster: Stephen Griffiths
programme.desc: Stephen Griffiths was a quite, withdrawn "runt" of a child who enjoyed the privilege of a private education. But growing up there festered an obsession with weapons and dismemberment.

programme.title: Making A Monster: Robert Maudsley
programme.desc: "Dr Bob Johnson (psychiatrist) speaks for the first time about the extraordinary experience he had with the serial killer dubbed Britain’s most dangerous prisoner.This is the first time he has ever been interviewed about Robert Maudsley"

programme.title: Making A Monster: Levi Bellfield
programme.desc: Levi Bellfield appeared to many as a charming "Jack the lad" . He had friends, a successful business, countless girlfriends, and almost a dozen children. But in reality, his predatory dangerous nature was much darker.

programme.title: Making A Monster: Robert Black
programme.desc: "Dr Richard Baddcock (psychiatrist) gives his first ever interview abouthis patientRobert Black, who was the most prolific child murderer the Uk has ever seen"

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Tobin
programme.desc: Peter Tobin is one of the most notorious serial killers in the UK. From 1991–2006 he raped and murdered three young girls; Dinah McNicol, Vicky Hamilton and Angelika Kluk. Yet even prior to these horrific murders he had a history of violence.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Stephen Cameron
programme.desc: Gripping documentary examining the fatal stabbing of 21-year-old motorist Stephen Cameron during a motorway altercation in 1996.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Rhys Jones
programme.desc: The parents of innocent 11-year-old Rhys Jones, shot on his way home from a football club in Liverpool 2007, speak about the harrowing day when they lost their son.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The London Nail Bombings
programme.desc: London was brought to a standstill in April 1999 when 23-year-old political extremist David Copeland caused terror with a bombing campaign.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Joanne Dennehy
programme.desc: Dermot Murnaghan returns to uncover the truth behind the horrific crimes of Peterborough serial killer Joanna Dennehy.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Keith Blakelock
programme.desc: In 1985, PC Keith Blakelock was murdered during a riot on a housing estate in London, triggered after a black woman died of heart failure during a house search. Nobody has been brought to justice for his murder, despite three investigations.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Little Miss Nobody: Alan Charlton
programme.desc: An old carpet dug up by workmen in a Cardiff back garden in 1989 was the beginning of a case that would push the boundaries of forensic science. The carpet contained human bones - but whose?

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Double Axe Murderer: Dennis Smalley
programme.desc: A double axe murderer and no clues - except tiny flakes of paint discovered deep in the wounds of one of the victims. This is a story of how forensic science - and the determination of one detective - found the killer.
programme.sub-title: The Double Axe Murderer: Dennis Smalley

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Into Thin Air: David Gilroy
programme.desc: It was a missing person’s case that shook the people of Scotland to their core. Within a week of Suzanne Pilley disappearing from her place of work in Edinburgh, police were convinced they were hunting for a killer - despite not having found a body.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Resolution To Kill: Colin Ireland
programme.desc: In the summer of 1993 a serial killer stalked London. The Metropolitan Police investigated a bizarre murder in which a man was found naked on his bed with a dead cat draped over him. He’d been strangled and his flat had been wiped of evidence.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Hitman And The Hairdresser: Fadi Nasri
programme.desc: A 29-year-old hairdresser was found brutally stabbed on her doorstep in a quiet suburban street of London. A recording of a threatening phone call seemed to suggest the motive, but every lead comes to a dead end.
programme.sub-title: The Hitman And The Hairdresser: Fadi Nasri

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers: Erica
programme.desc: A social media maven takes to the seas on a cruise she believes will boost her profile - but her trip is fatally cut short, and detectives must find out why.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers: Muriel
programme.desc: When a wealthy San Francisco socialite is bludgeoned to death with a whisky bottle, a key witness on board may be able to help investigators solve the shocking murder.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers: Deanna
programme.desc: When a youth ministry attendee disappears aboard a cruise ship, detectives suspect that someone in the ministry may have something to hide.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers: Liam
programme.desc: A father-daughter cruise comes to a disastrous end when the dad goes missing and a family is torn apart.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 10
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 9
programme.desc: We have always been told that mankind enjoys free will. Is this really true or have aliens created the means for controlling humanity?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 8
programme.desc: Take a fresh look at some classic alien encounters, UFOs and abductions, and discover several new stories.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 7
programme.desc: Experts open previously off-limits files in a bid to answer some of the most mysterious questions surrounding UFOs and extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 6
programme.desc: Experts open previously off-limits files in a bid to answer some of the most mysterious questions surrounding UFOs and extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 5
programme.desc: A look at the possibility that life began on Mars and travelled to Earth. Plus, if aliens exist, what plans do they have in store for us? Experts investigate.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 1
programme.desc: Series investigating compelling UFO and alien cases by opening previously off-limits secret files. Does the mysterious Blue Planet Project hold the answers?

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Ancient Ice Zombies
programme.desc: Thirty World War II aircraft all crashed in the same spot on the Greenland Ice sheet, causing experts to wonder if they all fell victim to the Arctic’s Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: The Vanishing Of Flight CS-59
programme.desc: A secret underground military research station in the middle of the Greenland Ice Sheet is revealed as one of the most elaborate cover stories in the history of the Cold War.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Curse Of The Ice Princess
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series investigates curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Lost On Killer Mountain
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Inca Child Sacrifice
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Revenge Of The Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Canadian divers spot an object that may solve a Cold War nuclear mystery. A mummified businessman is found atop Mexico’s highest peak. In Iceland, a cave said to be home to a fire giant is investigated. Mummified penguins are found in Antarctica.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Mystery Of Glacier Mummy
programme.desc: Mountain climbers in California find the body of a U.S. Army soldier. In Alaska, strange bundles of canvas and wood high up on a mountain are discovered. Volcanic glass is found in an unexpected place. A vital WWII weather station is uncovered.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Siberia's Frozen Necropolis
programme.desc: Researchers find a mummy buried in a strange way. A legendary polar exploration vehicle goes missing in Antarctica. A glacier cave on Mt. St. Helens is explored. An island in the Bering Sea may contain clues to the extinction of the woolly mammoth.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Secrets Of The Ice Arsenal
programme.desc: An unidentified metal object is found on Kiska Island. A centuries-old gold mining mystery is investigated. In Siberia, a network of ice tunnels is explored. Fossils unearthed in the Canadian Arctic lead to the discovery of a new species of camel.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Russia's Mountain Mummy Enigma
programme.desc: Russian soldiers make a grim discovery on a mountain. An abandoned town has an unusual past. Scientists working in Antarctica find something surprising beneath the ice. In Greenland, strange depressions in the ground are investigated.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Life After Death
programme.desc: Life After Death: Scientists in England conduct groundbreaking séances, while someone returns from the grave.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Monsters
programme.desc: Monsters: A fisherman uncovers the remains of an unidentified sea creature on a beach, and a hairy creature causes panic in New Delhi.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Alien Encounters: A cow is mutilated, a man is repeatedly abducted from his bed, and an astronomer's telescope intercepts a mysterious message.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: The End Of The World
programme.desc: The End of the World: Decoding Mayan texts, a physicist predicts a cataclysm will destroy the world. A NASA scientist makes an alien discovery.

programme.title: Family Ties: A Word To The Wise (Part 2)

programme.desc: Elyse’s coworker tells her that he’s in love with her.

programme.title: Family Ties: My Back Pages

programme.title: Family Ties: Paper Lion

programme.title: Family Ties: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: Skippy is the victim of a cruel fraternity prank when Alex intervenes.

programme.title: Family Ties: Battle of the Sexes: Part 2

programme.title: Family Ties: A Tale of Two Cities: Part 2

programme.title: Family Ties: Architect's Apprentice
programme.desc: Nick competes in a local art competition at Steven’s station.

programme.title: Family Ties: Band on the Run
