programme.title: Family Ties: A, My Name Is Alex:Part 1
programme.desc: Alex questions the meaning of life when his friend dies in a car accident.

programme.title: Moesha: Rhythm Dues
programme.desc: Mo encourages CPQ to submit their latest song to the local radio station for their “play it or stuff it” segment. When the song is played, it is well received. Q has written lyrics over a Morris Day song, and Morris shows up at “The Hole” where he plays.

programme.title: Moesha: The Double Date
programme.desc: Mo has been dating Bridgewood classmate Jeremy since her break up with Q.

programme.title: Moesha: He Ain’t Heavy – He’s Dee’s Brother
programme.desc: Mo gets a crush on Dee’s very attractive younger brother when he comes to visit.
programme.sub-title: He Ain’t Heavy – He’s Dee’s Brother

programme.title: Moesha: It’s My Paper And I’ll Cry If I Want To
programme.desc: Mo decides to publish her own Bridgewood newspaper when editor Mary Ellen refuses to add her to the staff of the existing paper.
programme.sub-title: It’s My Paper And I’ll Cry If I Want To

programme.title: Moesha: The “Short” Story
programme.desc: Mo’s group at the Den includes a short kid known as “Biggie”.

programme.title: Moesha: She’s Back
programme.desc: A famous female broadcast journalist who used to be friends with Frank speaks at Bridgewood, so Mo invites her to their house for dinner.

programme.title: Moesha: This Time You’ve Gone Too Far
programme.desc: Mo, Kim, Hakeem, Niecy, Morgan, Marco, and Chris head off on a road trip to San Diego.
programme.sub-title: This Time You’ve Gone Too Far

programme.title: Moesha: Body Language
programme.desc: Mo, Kim and Niecy play a game of “Truth or Dare”.

programme.title: Moesha: Model Employee
programme.desc: Rather than asking Frank every time she wants something, Mo decides to get a part-time job at the Class Act where Hakeem works.

programme.title: Moesha: Pajama Jam
programme.desc: Mo asks Frank if she can go to a slumber party at Morgan’s house.

programme.title: Moesha: Mo’s Money – Mo’s Money – Mo’s Money
programme.desc: Moesha wants to get cable and her own phone now that she has a job and is making money.
programme.sub-title: Mo’s Money – Mo’s Money – Mo’s Money

programme.title: Moesha: A House Is Not A Home
programme.desc: Moesha is living with Andell after having moved out of Frank & Dee’s home.
programme.sub-title: A House Is Not A Home

programme.title: Moesha: Moesha Meets Brandy
programme.desc: Moesha meets Brandy at a concert and we discover that Moesha is having a romance with Aaron, a college student.

programme.title: Moesha: Homecoming
programme.desc: With a little help from Myles and a visit from Grandma Mitchell, Moesha moves back home and returns to Crenshaw High.

programme.title: Moesha: Hello! What’s This?
programme.desc: Dee finds a joint in the couch while cleaning the house. Frank and Dee assume and accuse Mo, but Moesha is shocked when she catches Myles smoking.

programme.title: Moesha: Psyche Your Mind
programme.desc: Based on the family turmoil, the family begins counseling, but Moesha doesn’t want to air the family’s 'dirty laundry'.

programme.title: Moesha: Teacher
programme.desc: Moesha is attracted to a substitute teacher at Crenshaw. After they kiss, he leaves the school for 'personal reasons'.

programme.title: Moesha: I Know What You Did In The Third Grade
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are stalked by a student who was just released from jail who they haven’t seen since the third grade when he got into trouble because of them. Parody of Brandy’s feature 'I Still Know What You Did Last Summer…'
programme.sub-title: I Know What You Did In The Third Grade

programme.title: Moesha: A Terrible Thing Happened On My Tour Of College
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are invited to a college to attend a Prospective Freshman Weekend and someone slips a 'roofie' in her drink. Her boyfriend Aaron keeps her from being taken advantage of.
programme.sub-title: A Terrible Thing Happened On My Tour Of College

programme.title: Moesha: Birth Control
programme.desc: Moesha gets birth control pills when she decides she would like to lose her virginity to Aaron. However, things get complicated when Dee finds the pills in her purse.

programme.title: Moesha: A Class Act Christmas
programme.desc: Moesha, Hakeem, and the other employees of the Class Act are held hostage by a man dressed as Santa Claus protesting age discrimination.

programme.title: Moesha: The Crush
programme.desc: A friend of Myles who has a crush on Moesha pretends he cannot read so she can tutor him. However, after an article she writes about the success she has had with the little student is published in the LA Times, Moesha learns a hard lesson.

programme.title: Moesha: Barking Up The Wrong Tree
programme.desc: Hakeem accepts a job as assistant manager of the Class Act claiming there are financial difficulties at home. Moesha, concerned about his college education, confronts his mother who denies his claims.

programme.title: Moesha: Life Imitating Art
programme.desc: Racial tensions mount in Moesha’s high school after a mural depicting Latin American hero Caesar Chavez is purposely defaced.

programme.title: Moesha: OhMiGod, Fanatic
programme.desc: After Moesha and Kim have a huge fight, Moesha is surprised when MTV shows up at her door to film her bringing her best friend Kim to meet her favorite singer. Leanne Rimes guest stars.

programme.title: Moesha: The Rite Stuff
programme.desc: Moesha wants to boycott her debutante ball when she learns one of the girls is thrown out of the ceremony because she is pregnant.

programme.title: Moesha: I Love Moesha
programme.desc: When Moesha is once again rejected from her friends’ band, we enter a black and white parody of I LOVE LUCY wherein Lucy (Moesha) tries to get into Ricky’s show.

programme.title: Moesha: Home Is Where The Car Is
programme.desc: Moesha is disappointed when she is not appointed valedictorian of her senior class. She discovers the boy who has been appointed is homeless.
programme.sub-title: Home Is Where The Car Is

programme.title: Moesha: Girl’s Night In
programme.desc: At a slumber party, Moesha and her friends reminisce (with clips from past episodes) about the past four years together.

programme.title: Moesha: It Takes Two
programme.desc: Kim’s mother, Nikki, is re-entering a journey she started 18 years ago. With Dee’s help, she will be completing her education to receive a high school diploma.

programme.title: Moesha: Had To Be You
programme.desc: An old boyfriend of Andell’s comes back into her life and proposes to her. Moesha tries to keep Andell and Moesha’s Uncle Bernie together before it’s too late.

programme.title: Moesha: The Prom
programme.desc: Moesha’s date for the proms cancels at the last minute. She goes unescorted and meets a handsome mysterious boy who disappears at midnight. She tries to find him, but to no avail.

programme.title: Moesha: Independence Day
programme.desc: It’s Moesha’s 18th birthday, and as a surprise, her family and friends unknowingly invite all of Moesha’s past boyfriends to the party.

programme.title: Moesha: I Studied Twelve Years For This?
programme.desc: When Moesha’s car breaks down, she, Hakeem, and Niecy are late for their graduation ceremony.
programme.sub-title: I Studied Twelve Years For This?

programme.title: Moesha: Good Vibrations?
programme.desc: A frustrated Moesha longs for a promotion from 'gopher' to writer at Vibe magazine but believes that her boss, Joe Scott, would rather she pay her dues with something other than her writing talent.

programme.title: Moesha: Fired Up
programme.desc: Eager to get on the fast track at Vibe Magazine, Moesha pretends to be a reporter to land a Maya Angelou interview. But her ambition, coupled with Maya’s advice, leads Moesha down an entirely different path than she’d planned.

programme.title: Moesha: The Party’s Over (Here)
programme.desc: Unable to resist the temptations of college life, Moesha and Niecy become regulars on the party circuit, until their attendance at a late-night frat party takes its toll in more ways than one.

programme.title: Moesha: Mis-Directed Study
programme.desc: Moesha is flying high after she gets a job tutoring one of the basketball team’s star players until she finds out what kind of game he really wants to play.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Berkshire Revisits
programme.desc: Our two couples are at a similar stage in their lives, looking to buy their first homes together. Each had set their sights on pricey patches in the costly capital, but did they really know what they wanted and where they wanted it?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Guildford
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are in Surrey on a quest to find dream homes for two sets of frustrated house hunters. Two very different budgets and briefs but with the property market raging it looks like they've taken on double the trouble.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South Liverpool
programme.desc: Will Phil be the knight in shining armour to rescue these damsels in distress, and will Kirstie turn out to be Kate's property fairy godmother? Will they fail in their quest or find property success in Liverpool South?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Home Counties & North Yorks Revist
programme.desc: In Yorkshire, Trudi & Steve were moving to be closer to family-whilst in Luton, Zena wanted to get out of mum and dad's.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Northampton
programme.desc: Despite a slowdown in the housing market, property is still very much headline news, and we love it! But, finding that all singing, all dancing dream home is tougher than ever!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bristol & Avon
programme.desc: This week they're in the South West of the country taking on two sets of hapless house hunters.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South Bucks
programme.desc: With both sets of house hunters determined to have it all, Kirstie and Phil are going to have to use all the tricks of the trade if they're going to help them move forward and hopefully into the house of their dreams!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Kent
programme.desc: 20-somethings Sophie and Niall are ready to buy their first place. They say they want something practical-but it soon becomes clear that for super-fussy Sophie- practical is no match for party pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Glasgow
programme.desc: In Glasgow is first time buyer project manager and property obsessive Adam. With a budget of £250,000, he's looked at 500 properties in the 9 months!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Sheffield, Windsor Revisits
programme.desc: Adrenaline junkies Deborah and Justin Beeley had more stuff than they could cope with while Matt Rushworth's entire life could be squeezed into his well travelled backpack. Could Phil and Kirstie find fitting homes for both of them?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bucks & Aberdeen Revisit
programme.desc: In Buckinghamshire, Emma and Andrew had been looking for the ideal family home, whilst in Aberdeenshire Karen and Russell needed to cut down their daily commute.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Revisit: Hastings
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil revisit two couples in Hastings, Jakki and Scott, and newlyweds Nicola and Chris, only to find that one couple is now in a very different place.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Wicklow
programme.desc: This week we're helping a young mother achieve her dream of moving back to Ireland. Sue Wessell longs to return to the place where she grew up and has persuaded husband Chris and their two children to up sticks and relocate to the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Derbyshire
programme.desc: This week Phil and Kirstie are searching in Derbyshire, where their first couple Bryone & Daniel Burton have moved from London, along with daughter Ruby.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Buckinghamshire
programme.desc: Just a stone's throw from London, Buckinghamshire is the ideal location for two couples trying to combine high flying careers in the City, with the peace and quiet of small-town life for their young families.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Windsor Revisit
programme.desc: About two years ago, first time buyers asked us to guide them. I've come back to see whether or not they lived happily.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: London Southside
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are searching in South London with three essential workers who need all the help they can get. They're all new to the area, have very modest budgets, and want to find their dream first homes.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Home Counties
programme.desc: The home counties are the location for this weeks search. Phil is helping picky buyers Lysan and Bo leave the hustle and bustle of London and get back to their roots in Bedfordshire.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: New England
programme.desc: This week we are with one couple who have babies on the brain and another who are only 3 months from having one.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Sutton Coldfield
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are kicking-off the series with one hell of a challenge, they're in Birmingham, house hunting for three generations of one family… one big house, for one big, extended family.

programme.title: Great British Menu: London and South East Dessert
programme.desc: It's the battle of the London and South East chefs – returning contender, Phil Howard and Graham Garrett and Marcus McGuinness. Today is the final chance to impress the veteran with their dessert dishes.

programme.title: Great British Menu: London and South East Judging
programme.desc: It's decision time on Great British Menu for the chefs from the London and South East region. One chef left the competition and only two remain to cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort, and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Wales Starter
programme.desc: It's the battle of the Wales chefs – returning contenders, Richard Davies, James Sommerin and Stephen Terry. They kick things off with their starters, but which one is going to be first off the blocks?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Wales Fish
programme.desc: It's the battle of the Wales chefs – returning contenders, Richard Davies, James Sommerin and Stephen Terry. They cook their fish course, but which one but which one will prevail?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Wales Main
programme.desc: It's the battle of the Wales chefs – returning contenders, Richard Davies, James Sommerin and Stephen Terry. They cook their main course, but only one chef will take gold?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Wales Dessert
programme.desc: It's the battle of the Wales chefs – returning contenders, Richard Davies, James Sommerin and Stephen Terry. Today is the final chance to impress the veteran with their dessert dishes.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Wales Judging
programme.desc: It's decision time on Great British Menu for the chefs from the Wales region. One chef left the competition and only two remain to cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort, and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu: South West Starter
programme.desc: It's the battle of the South West chefs – returning contenders, Paul Ainsworth and Nathan Outlaw plus newcomer Simon Hulstone. They kick things off with their starters, but which one is going to be first off the blocks?

programme.title: Great British Menu: South West Fish
programme.desc: It's the battle of the South West chefs – returning contenders, Paul Ainsworth and Nathan Outlaw plus newcomer Simon Hulstone. They cook their fish course, but which one will prevail?

programme.title: Great British Menu: South West Main
programme.desc: It's the battle of the South West chefs – returning contenders, Paul Ainsworth and Nathan Outlaw plus newcomer Simon Hulstone. They cook their main course, but which chef will take gold?

programme.title: Great British Menu: South West Dessert
programme.desc: It's the battle of the South West chefs – returning contenders, Paul Ainsworth and Nathan Outlaw plus newcomer Simon Hulstone. Today is the final chance to impress the veteran with their dessert dishes.

programme.title: Great British Menu: South West Judging
programme.desc: It's decision time on Great British Menu for the chefs from the South West region. One chef left the competition and only two remain to cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort, and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Finals Starter
programme.desc: The Great British Menu 2012 enters its final week. In today's programme the finalists cook their starters, which will be tasted and scored by the Great British Menu judges and veteran judge Richard Corrigan.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Finals Main
programme.desc: Today the chosen finalists cook their main courses, which will be tasted and scored by the Great British Menu judges and veteran judge Tom Kerridge.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Finals Dessert
programme.desc: It's Desserts day in the finals and the last chance for the competing chefs to impress the judges and veteran Angela Hartnett. The judges finally reveal the winning four dishes which will make up this year's Great British Menu.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Banquet
programme.desc: The winners have been announced and this final programme follows the successful chefs in the run up to the banquet, as they make the painstaking preparations, for what is one of the most important meals they will ever cook.

programme.title: Great British Menu: North West Dessert
programme.desc: It's the North West's chefs' last chance to impress before the final two chefs are chosen to face the Great British Menu judging panel. Which dessert will help get two chefs through?

programme.title: Great British Menu: North West Judging
programme.desc: It's decision time on Great British Menu Does Comic Relief for the chefs from the North West. One chef left the competition and only two remain, who will cook their entire menus for the judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Starter
programme.desc: It's the curtain raiser as the Central chefs go all out. Three culinary heavyweights return, two Michelin star chef Daniel Clifford, Michelin star Richard Bainbridge and Will Holland who has beaten them both before in the Great British Menu kitchen.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Fish
programme.desc: The chefs cook their fish courses. Daniel Clifford puts up a creative dish called 'Catch of the Day'. Richard Bainbridge's dish is titled 'Tongue in Cheek'. And Will Holland's dish - 'Coconut poached brill, crab, celeriac and tomato essence'.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Main
programme.desc: The chefs from the Central region cook their main courses. And veteran Marcus Wareing is looking for perfection.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Dessert
programme.desc: It's the last chance for the chefs from the Central region to impress before the final two are chosen to face the Great British Menu judging panel. Which dessert will help get two chefs through?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Judging
programme.desc: It's decision time on Great British Menu Does Comic Relief for the chefs from the Central region. One chef left the competition and only two remain, who will cook their entire menus for the judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu: South West Starter
programme.desc: Today nerves play a huge part as all three chefs from the South West, fresh to the competition, get to grips with their new environment. Chris Eden, Peter Sanchez-Iglesias and Emily Watkins cook their starters.

programme.title: Great British Menu: South West Fish
programme.desc: In today's programme the South West chefs cook their fish courses. Cornishman Chris Eden takes inspiration from home to create a lobster and oyster dish called 'Gone Surfing'.

programme.title: Dynasty: Fallon's Father
programme.desc: Alexis tells Cecil Colby that Fallon is his daughter; Blake and Steven are urged to reconcile; Dr. Toscanni pulls an unconscious Steven from the pool and rushes him to the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty: Reconciliation
programme.desc: Steven returns to the mansion to recover from injuries sustained by his fall; Krystle's niece, Sammy Jo, arrives to spend a few weeks with the Carrigtons; Alexis hires a private investigator to delve into Krystle's past.

programme.title: Dynasty: Viva Las Vegas
programme.desc: Nick reveals to his sister that Blake is responsible for the death of their younger brother; Sammy Jo and Steven spend the night together; Alexis shoots at Krystle's horse, causing her to be thrown to the ground and hospitalized.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Miscarriage
programme.desc: Krystle loses her baby; Steven and Sammy Jo begin dating, although Steven is in love with Claudia. Fallon continues her affair with Nick, and is jealous to find him visiting Krystle in the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty: Mid-East Wedding
programme.desc: Fallon learns she is pregnant and tells Jeff she is having an abortion; he agrees to divorce her but only if she bears the child. Krystle remains despondent over the loss of her baby; Claudia takes a job with Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Psychiatrist
programme.desc: Alexis tricks Blake into coming to Rome and further traps him by hiring a gossip photographer to snap suggestive photos of the two; Jeff begs Fallon to cancel her abortion; as Nick confronts Krystle, his consolation gives way to passion.

programme.title: Dynasty: Sammy Jo and Steven Marry
programme.desc: Nick tells Krystle of his deep feelings for her; Steven and Sammy Jo marry; Fallon cancels her abortion; after the scandal caused by the papparazzi photos of Alexis and Blake, Krystle leaves her husband.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Car Explosion
programme.desc: Nick persuades Krystle to leave Blake; Steven and Sammy Jo announce they are married; Blake is attacked by gangsters and blinded when his car is bombed.

programme.title: Dynasty: Blake's Blindness
programme.desc: Blake remains blinded following the explosion; Nick asks Krystle to divorce her husband and marry him; Blake investigates Nick's past; Alexis is determined to drive Krystle from Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Hearing
programme.desc: Fallon confesses her love to Nick, but he is interested in Krystle; Blake's attempts to bring gangster Logan Rhinewood before a Crime Committee hearing are thwarted; Sammy Jo tells Alexis she knows her secret; Blake receives an anonymous letter.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Iago Syndrome
programme.desc: Krystle says goodbye to Nick and leaves Denver; Blake offers to adopt Jeff; Cecil blackmails Claudia; Nick accepts Blake's explanation of his brother's death.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Party
programme.desc: At a party in her honor, Sammy Jo embarrasses the Carringtons and reveals to Fallon that Blake is not her father; Jeff leaves the party with Claudia; Blake tells Krystle his eyesight is restored; Fallon is left unconscious after a car accident.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Baby
programme.desc: Fallon gives birth to a son; Alexis offers Sammy Jo $25,000 to leave Denver; Jeff and Claudia make love; Krystle accuses Alexis of killing her baby; Alexis learns Krystle and Blake are not legally married.

programme.title: Dynasty: Mother and Son
programme.desc: Upon learning he is not her true father, Fallon refuses to see Blake; Jeff falls in love with Claudia, who is caught stealing from Denver-Carrington; Fallon's baby undergoes emergency surgery; Claudia's husband and daughter are believed dead.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Gun
programme.desc: A blood test proves that Blake is Fallon's true father; Steven travels to Hollywood in search of his wife; Claudia learns her husband and daughter are believed to be dead; as Krystle struggles with an armed Claudia, the gun discharges.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Fragment
programme.desc: Claudia is hospitalized after the shooting incident; Krystle is implicated. Logan Rhinewood continues to amass Devner-Carrington; Cecil proposes marriage to Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Shakedown
programme.desc: Claudia remains confused following the accident; Jeff urges Fallon to reconcile; Steven is blackmailed by a young drifter.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Two Princes
programme.desc: Steven is arrested; Alexis and Cecil plan to marry; Fallon tells Nick it's over between them; Claudia believes Fallon's baby is her now deceased daughter Lindsay.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Courtney Cox
programme.desc: Actress Courteney Cox joins Bear to challenge herself into sharp edged discomfort amidst the jagged peaks and descending cliffs on the windswept coast of Ireland.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Zac Efron
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Zac Efron heads into the Appalachian wilderness of the Catskill Mountains in New York. They parachute into the woods, rappel down cliffs and search for shelter.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Mel B
programme.desc: Spice Girl Mel B joins Bear on the two hundred foot cliffs of the Welsh coastline, where a final descent sends Mel into breakdown mode; Bear is stung by a jellyfish, forcing Mel to practice some first aid skills.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Channing Tatum
programme.desc: Channing Tatum hikes, explores and climbs during his expedition to Yosemite National Park. The pair begin with a helicopter ride, move through dense forest, then eat some dangerous food.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Lena Headey
programme.desc: Lena Headey and Bear journey through Spain's Iberian Peninsula; they rappel from a towering ridge, dine on bone marrow from a goat carcass and cross a lake using a makeshift raft during an unexpected storm; Lena details her life and rise to stardom.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Roger Federer
programme.desc: Bear takes one of the best athletes of all time, Roger Federer, on a daring adventure through the Swiss Alps as they attempt to navigate the tough terrain. They descend a frozen waterfall and use tennis rackets as snowshoes.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Kate Hudson
programme.desc: Oscar-nominated actress Kate Hudson goes on a journey with Bear that involves a treacherous mountain range in Italy; Kate shares details of her unique upbringing.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Deon Sanders
programme.desc: Bear Grylls takes NFL hall of famer Deion Sanders to the mesas and canyons of Utah for his first ever camping trip.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Sterling K. Brown
programme.desc: Actor Sterling K. Brown joins Bear in the high mountains of Colorado, where they battle plummeting temperatures while descending a sheer rock face, track an elusive deer and rappel down a waterfall.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Tom Arnold
programme.desc: Tom Arnold heads into the unpredictable coastal mountains of Oregon. They take a helicopter to an isolated forest, hike through woodland, catch a trout and cross a river with the help of a log.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Uzo Aduba
programme.desc: Uzo Aduba joins Bear on a harrowing journey to Spain's Pyrenees Mountains, where they face a poisonous viper and secure a dinner of field mice; Uzo shares the story of her path to fame and her family's emigration from Nigeria.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Drew Brees
programme.desc: Bear Grylls ventures deep into Panama's Camino de Cruces jungle with Super Bowl winning quarterback Drew Brees, exploring caves and wrestling a six-foot crocodile.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Kate Winslett
programme.desc: Acclaimed movie star Kate Winslet takes a role like never before, as Bear paramotors them both to the top of the Snowdonia Mountains in Wales.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Julianne Hough
programme.desc: Bear and actress Julianne Hough navigate the unforgiving terrain and wild animals of the African savanna; Julianne talks about her adolescence and her determination to succeed.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Michael B. Jordan
programme.desc: Actor Michael B. Jordan joins Grylls in Wales where they start their journey by dropping into rough waters off the coast before making their way up the coast and to the top of the mountains for their exit.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, President Barack Obama
programme.desc: President Barack Obama and Bear Grylls explore the Alaskan wilderness, where they observe evidence of climate change, sample wild salmon and catkins tea made with water from melting glaciers; Obama discusses his official duties, parenthood and faith.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Vanessa Hudgens
programme.desc: Bear and Vanessa Hudgens rappel from a helicopter into the high Sierra for a scenic adventure; Bear and Vanessa evade a boulder avalanche, summit a massive dormant volcano, and encounter a rattlesnake; Vanessa talks about her rise to stardom.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Nick Jonas
programme.desc: Renowned survivalist Bear Grylls is accompanied by singer Nick Jonas on another one of his journeys into the wilderness.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Ed Helms
programme.desc: Actor Ed Helms faces sheer cliffs, crumbling rock and a cringeworthy dinner menu while atop Colorado mountains; Helms discusses the road to his career in comedy.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Julia Roberts
programme.desc: Movie star Julia Roberts joins Bear on a lifesaving Red Nose Day adventure in Kenya. They're on a two-day trek enduring blistering savannah temperatures.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Joseph Gordon-Levitt
programme.desc: Bear and Joseph Gordon-Levitt navigate Kenya's unyielding terrain; Joseph and Bear navigate a perilous rappel, milk a camel for hydration, ascend a massive rock dome and battle a crocodile for dinner; Joseph talks about his family and rise to fame.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Mega Cities
programme.desc: Mega Cities provide a bustling home to populations of over 10 million. Travel from the high-density living of Shanghai and Bangkok to the sprawling cities of Delhi and Mexico City, each the backdrop for dynamic cultures.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Cruises
programme.desc: There is something seductive about setting sail. Cruises offer us a chance to dip our toes into the 70% of our planet awash with oceans, rivers, and lakes, exploring places that can only be reached by daring to leave the shore.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Archipelagos
programme.desc: The romantic notion of island life has always attracted us. Explore the histories, cultures, and unique ways of life on the World’s Greatest Archipelagos - clusters of islands that share common bonds of geography, geology, and genealogy.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Coral Islands
programme.desc: The reef systems that gave rise to coral islands support the vast majority of marine species on our planet, but they are under threat. Explore the delicate balance between exploiting and preserving these extraordinary natural wonders.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Nearshore Islands
programme.desc: Some of the world’s greatest islands are so close that they blend in with the mainland. But regardless of their size and origins, they are often the islands we are drawn to the most, each forging their own unique identity.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Bridges
programme.desc: A bridge is a structure that’s designed to transcend, but a great bridge can define the place where it stands. Symbols of human ingenuity, beauty, and grandeur, bridges connect us not only to each other but also to the past.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Treks
programme.desc: Every journey made by foot promises a grand adventure. From the highest mountains to the wildest jungle realms, treks venture down the road less travelled, allowing us to connect to nature, history, and culture, one step at a time.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Extreme Animals
programme.desc: Extreme Animals features environments hostile to humans, but havens to many animals. Witness gorgeous glow-worms, high flying condors, parched thorny devils, emperor penguins, and polar bears in this journey through life on the edge.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Deserts
programme.desc: For all their reputation as inhospitable places, deserts are full of incredible plants and animals that have adapted to the climate. They are bursting with geological wonders that inspire and are home to some of the most life in the world.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Water Adventures
programme.desc: We are captivated by oceans, rivers, and lakes - the power, the flow, the reflective stillness. And as we seek to get closer, we immerse ourselves in an expanding range of aquatic experiences.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Sacred Sites
programme.desc: Ancient in architecture and detailed in design, these man-made masterpieces stand as testaments to the strength of human faith. These sites endure as a timeless reminder of resilience, respect, and the need to reflect.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Ancient Cities
programme.desc: In Ancient Cities, we journey to these ancestors of influence such as Luang Prabang, Vienna, and Istanbul where religious and cultural centers have shaped the ways in which we view the world around us and continue to do so in modern times.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Land Adventures
programme.desc: Most land adventures come with some risk - a chance to confront our deepest fears, resist the pull of the ordinary, and soar into the wild unknown.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Port Cities
programme.desc: Some of the most stunning cities are port cities - Sydney, Rio, Cape Town - and are also some of the most culturally diverse and vibrant. The great maritime cities of the world bridge countries and continents and unite the global community.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Mountains
programme.desc: The earth’s fragile crust has folded and faulted, and nowhere are these natural forces more evident than in the world’s great mountains. Explore the highest peaks of the world’s terrain - the rugged realm between heaven and earth.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Volcanic Islands
programme.desc: They've been worshiped and feared over the millennia. But in the wake of drama and destruction, the elements give rise to cultures and nations so beautiful that we've come to know them as the world's greatest volcanic islands.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Wetland Animals
programme.desc: Wetland Animals dives into the swamps, rivers, and flood plains of the Everglades, Botswana’s Okavango Delta, Kakadu National Park in Australia, and the Amazon to see deadly crocodiles, piranhas, hippopotamus, flamingo, manatee, and platypus.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Coasts
programme.desc: Along coasts, one element ends and another begins. No two days are ever the same on a coastline: the only thing that remains a constant is the timeless power of the sea.

programme.title: Arthur: Water and The Brain/Arthur The Unfunny
programme.desc: Is The Brain a snob? That seems to be the explanation for why he won't go to Waterworld with his friends. And, Arthur's a notorious joke-killer. But when he's scheduled to perform as a carnival clown, he learns how to make people laugh!
programme.sub-title: Water and The Brain/Arthur The Unfunny

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Sells Out/Mind Your Manners
programme.desc: To earn the money for a new video game, Arthur decides to sell his old toys through his school's Web site. The Tibble Twins want to take Grandmother out to dinner, but she'd rather stay home. Is it because of their terrible table manners?

programme.title: Arthur: Fern and the Case of the Stolen Story/Sue Ellen Vegges Out
programme.desc: Fern has writer's block! Fortunately, Ladonna's full of stories, and Fern decides to "borrow" the tales and simply change the names. Then, when Sue Ellen decides to stop eating meat, Muffy and Francine compete to be the best vegetarian.
programme.sub-title: Fern and the Case of the Stolen Story/Sue Ellen Vegges Out

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen Moves In/The Perfect Brother
programme.desc: A new girl has arrived in town and no one knows anything about her. And judging by the strange things happening at her house no one wants to know. Then, it's great having a friend spend the weekend.
programme.sub-title: Sue Ellen Moves In/The Perfect Brother

programme.title: Arthur: D.W., Queen of the Comeback/In My Africa
programme.desc: The Tibbles tease, D.W. fires back, the Tibbles taunt, D.W. has a snappy comeback, and round and round they go! Will it ever end? Then, D.W.'s new classmate, Cheikh, is Brain's young cousin…and is also from Senegal, Africa!
programme.sub-title: D.W., Queen of the Comeback/In My Africa

programme.title: Arthur: Adventures in Budylon/Ladonna Compson: Party Animal
programme.desc: D.W. and Bud embark on an epic wilderness adventure--the backyard has never been so exciting! Apple picking, bake sales, craft classes…there's so much to do in Elwood City in the fall! And Ladonna's determined to do it all.
programme.sub-title: Adventures in Budylon/Ladonna Compson: Party Animal

programme.title: Arthur: Binky's Music Madness/Brain Freeze
programme.desc: Everyone loves the Bang on a Can All-Stars, a funky experimental music group that's touring around Elwood City. Everyone that is, except Binky. A new ice cream shop has just opened up across the block. Will Brain's shop be able to survive?

programme.title: Arthur: For the Birds/Ungifted
programme.desc: Brain dreams of being the first to spot a rare bird species called the green-tailed grebe, making him famous. Arthur and Buster's friendship is put to the test when Arthur gives away a present that Buster had given him for his birthday.

programme.title: Arthur: The Wheel Deal/The Buster Report
programme.desc: After an injury, Brain has to spend some time using a wheelchair. Will he be able to compete in a basketball tournament for charity? The kids are assigned to write a report on someone they admire, and George picks….Buster!

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Big Top Trouble/George Blows His Top
programme.desc: Francine is sure she will be a star at circus camp. How hard could it be? Then, George is always more than happy to lend his pals whatever they need. But Buster's borrowing gets out of control.
programme.sub-title: Francine's Big Top Trouble/George Blows His Top

programme.title: Arthur: George Scraps His Sculpture/Arthur's Big Meltdown
programme.desc: George creates a piece of art for the county-wide art show with the help of guest artist Kevin Sampson. Then, Arthur must learn how to control his temper after getting angry over a pair of sneakers!
programme.sub-title: George Scraps His Sculpture/Arthur's Big Meltdown

programme.title: Arthur: Fifteen
programme.desc: How much can Arthur and his friends do in 15 minutes? Can they all accomplish these missions impossible before the clock counts all the way down? Only time will tell!

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Blankie/Arthur's Substitute Teacher Trouble
programme.desc: D.W. has one little secret--her blankie. When it mysteriously disappears, Arthur is pressed into service. Find that blankie--or else! Next, the unbelievable has happened--Mr. Ratburn has gotten sick. And who's going to be the substitute?

programme.title: Arthur: Hide And Snake/Muffy's New Best Friend
programme.desc: The kids capture a snake and learn that it's possibly poisonous--after it gets lost in Arthur's house! Why is Muffy interviewing for a new best friend? She and Francine are usually inseparable, but lately it seems they have less in common.
programme.sub-title: Hide And Snake/Muffy's New Best Friend

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Babysits/Arthur's Cousin Catastrophe
programme.desc: You think running a marathon is hard? Try babysitting for the Terrible Tibble Twins. Next, Arthur's family is hosting the once-a-year-is-more-than-enough family reunion. But a major thunderstorm turns this into a reunion to remember.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Library Card/Arthur's Big Hit
programme.desc: When D.W. discovers that she can get her own library card, she rejoices at the world of books waiting for her. And, is it ever okay to hit someone? Sometimes you just get so mad, you wanna....pow! Right??

programme.title: Arthur: Baby Kate and the Imaginary Mystery/Strangers on a Train
programme.desc: Nadine, D.W.'s imaginary friend is missing. Sue Ellen can't wait to travel on an old-fashioned train, but once onboard, she discovers that the train is not as spectacular as she had hoped–until she finds a mysterious diary.
programme.sub-title: Baby Kate and the Imaginary Mystery/Strangers on a Train

programme.title: Arthur: Listen Up!/Arthur's New Old Vacation
programme.desc: When Francine's Bubbe passes away, Muffy tries to understand how she can help her friend. Then, when Arthur's family goes on the same vacation they take every year, he and Buster try to make it more exciting.

programme.title: Arthur: Brain's Brain/Brain Sees Stars
programme.desc: Brain's Easter egg hunts are notoriously hard. But this year's might prove impossible if Brain can't remember where he hid the final egg. Then, crazy coincidences have prevented Brain from seeing a meteor shower in person.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Stray Netkitin/Bats in the Belfry
programme.desc: D.W. is panicked when a virus ruins the Read family computer. Who will take care of her virtual pet? Arthur and D.W. are thrilled when Grandma Thora lets them turn her attic into a clubhouse. But will a bat threaten their new play space?
programme.sub-title: D.W.'S Stray Netkitin/Bats in the Belfry

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella's Special Edition/The Secret Life Of Dogs & Babies
programme.desc: The latest book about everyone's favorite boy wizard--Henry Skreever--is finally out! Every kid in town is lining up to get it, except Prunella, who's ordered a limited edition from England. Ever wonder what Baby Kate and Pal are thinking?
programme.sub-title: Prunella's Special Edition/The Secret Life Of Dogs & Babies

programme.title: Arthur: Night of the Tibble/Read and Flumberghast
programme.desc: The Tibble Twins are having their first sleepover! Will the Tibbles lock James in the dark basement? Then, a cupcake's been stolen! The primary suspect: Tommy Tibble. D.W. gathers a jury and demands that justice be served.
programme.sub-title: Night of the Tibble/Read and Flumberghast

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Vs. Binky/Operation: DW!
programme.desc: Binky may be tough and strong, but when it comes to sports, he always seems to choke. D.W. is having trouble hearing and needs an ear operation. Is it okay to be just a little bit scared?

programme.title: Arthur: Follow the Bouncing Ball/Buster Baxter and the Letter from the Sea
programme.desc: Alberto Molina's beloved soccer ball--signed by his favorite Ecuadorian soccer star --is lost! While on vacation, Buster discovers a message in a bottle on the shore. Could it be a message from the people of the lost city of Atlantis?
programme.sub-title: Follow the Bouncing Ball/Buster Baxter and the Letter from the Sea

programme.title: The Rhythm and Roots of Arthur
programme.desc: Pack your bags, buckle your seatbelts, and get ready for an ARTHUR road trip to the family farm! Arthur’s Great-Grand Uncle Theo is celebrating his 85th birthday, so the Reads (and Buster) are off to Ohio to join in the festivities.

programme.title: Arthur: Mr. Ratburn's Secret Identity/Besties
programme.desc: Mysterious calls. Superhuman strength. Is Mr. Ratburn secretly a superhero? When Buster and Ladonna bond over a memorable trip to the movies, Arthur feels left out. Has Ladonna taken his place as Buster's best bud?

programme.title: Arthur: Falafelosophy/The Great Lint Rush
programme.desc: Sue Ellen tries her hand at writing and illustrating a graphic novel. Then, Mr. Toad is back! And he's ready to corner the Sock Market, leaving everyone in Elwood City barefoot and bereft.

programme.title: Arthur: The Agent of Change/D.W. Unties the Knot
programme.desc: The latest animated hit movie about a boy and his truck has left Muffy and Francine disappointed. Why doesn't there seem to be any cool female characters on screen? After watching "The Wedding Channel," D.W. wants to get married!
programme.sub-title: The Agent of Change/D.W. Unties the Knot

programme.title: Arthur: Background Blues/And Now Let's Talk To Some Kids
programme.desc: Wouldn't it be cool to find out that your ancestors were famous frontier explorers? But what if they were just...plain folks? The Magic Toolbox show is coming to Ratburn's class to put the kids on TV!
programme.sub-title: Background Blues/And Now Let's Talk To Some Kids

programme.title: Arthur: Lend Me Your Ear/The Butler Did It
programme.desc: Arthur, Buster, and Brain are worried when Mr. Ratburn isn't acting like himself. He's always pleased to see them, so what’s made him change? When Mr. Crosswire gets a robot butler for Father's Day, Muffy fears Bailey may be replaced.
programme.sub-title: Lend Me Your Ear/The Butler Did It

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Secret Admirer/The Last King of Lambland
programme.desc: Buster receives a box of chocolates in the mail from a secret admirer. It's driving him crazy! Who could possibly like him that much? And James receives a gift from his uncle in Scotland--a toy lamb that will give its owner special powers!
programme.sub-title: Buster's Secret Admirer/The Last King of Lambland

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Bombing of Germany
programme.desc: The development of the B-17 bomber, which allowed American planes to reach inside Germany and bomb its cities.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: U-Boat War
programme.desc: U-boats posed the deadliest threat to Allied convoys traveling the Atlantic.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Herbert Cukurs
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines how Israeli secret service agents traveled to South America to assassinate Nazi war criminal Herbert Cukurs. Known as the Hangman of Riga, Cukurs was responsible for the deaths of over 30,000 Latvian Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines the capture of Adolf Eichmann considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust. Eichmann was captured outside of his home near Buenos Aires in Argentina by Mossad agents.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters looks at how the husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines how, a half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele. After the war, Mengele flees to Argentina where he lives a relatively nondescript life.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Kurt Lischka
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters looks at how German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines how French investigators hunted down Paul Touvier a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Franz Stangl & Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Barbarossa Unleased 1941
programme.desc: E1 begins with a brief examination of the rationale of hatred projected by Hitler onto the Soviet-Slavic-Jewish world. Then it leaps forward, to see Hitler initiate an invasion of the USSR.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Time is Blood 1942-5
programme.desc: Episode 2 begins after the desperate German winter of 1941. Yet 1942 began badly for the Soviets, with more vicious Nazi campaigning seeing millions more Russians captured and starved.

programme.title: Hitler and Stalin: A Secret Relationship: Mistrust and Mutual Fascination
programme.desc: We have long ignored the "intimate" relationship between Hitler and Stalin, this mixture of mistrust and mutual fascination.

programme.title: Hitler and Stalin: A Secret Relationship: Two Tyrants
programme.desc: With the German-Soviet pact, Stalin and Hitler put aside all political logic to let the Western democracies believe that such a rapprochement was impossible.

programme.title: NEW: War Story: Bomber Command: Hitting Back
programme.desc: After surviving the German bombing campaign of British cities, RAF Bomber Command struck back against Germany. The devastating consequences of raids, for both for the young men in the skies and the people on the ground, are portrayed in this film.

programme.title: NEW: War Story: Bomber Command: Getting Home
programme.desc: In this film, Bomber Command personnel and a Luftwaffe pilot take the viewer through the frightening reality of fighting in the skies as they try to get a damaged bomber home.

programme.title: NEW: War Story: Bomb Girls Remember
programme.desc: During the Second World War, 250,000 Canadian women helped to build the arsenal of democracy. These young women met the challenges of factory work and helped to win the Second World War, and by doing so, paved the way for future generations.

programme.title: NEW: War Story: Sicily: The First Campaign
programme.desc: The Sicily Campaign began with the largest seaborne invasion in history on 9-10 July 1943. The Allied forces of Britain, Canada, and the United States sought to knock Italy out of the war and attack Germany from the south.

programme.title: NEW: War Story: Ortona: The War Inside
programme.desc: The War Inside is a personal retelling of one of the fiercest battles of the Italian Campaign from the searing points of view of Canadian infantrymen, a tanker, a stretcher bearer, and a German paratrooper.

programme.title: NEW: War Story: The Road to Rome
programme.desc: The Road to Rome examines the incredible experiences of Canadian veterans, the victories and horrors of armoured combat, and the pivotal value, far too often neglected, of the overall Italian Campaign.

programme.title: NEW: War Story: Out of the Clouds: Paras in Normandy
programme.desc: In Normandy, the 1st Canadian Parachute Battalion proved itself to be in the vanguard of the best-trained and toughest units in the Allied forces.
programme.sub-title: Out of the Clouds: Paras in Normandy

programme.title: NEW: War Story: Across the Rhine: Paras in Germany
programme.desc: In mid-September 1944, the remnants of the battered 1st Canadian Parachute Battalion participated in the largest parachute drop in history, fought a successful battle.
programme.sub-title: Across the Rhine: Paras in Germany

programme.title: NEW: War Story: Vengeance
programme.desc: In 1941, nearly 30,000 Jews escaped the ghettos and work camps and they joined the growing underground resistance army, actively fighting the Nazis.

programme.title: NEW: War Story: Prisoners of the Sun
programme.desc: On 16 November 1941, two Canadian battalions arrived in the British colony of Hong Kong. Their aim: Bolster the Empire’s defenses in the event of aggression by the restless forces of Japan, stationed only kilometres away in occupied China.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Alante has spent the last 8 years planning a life with his online love Nevaeh. She's perfect but her disappearances have Alante worried. Nev and Max help to uncover a mysterious truth that affects Alante's entire town.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Danny is intent on building a family with his beautiful online love, despite her violent past. But when he enlists Nev and Max to help him finally meet her in person, they soon discover she may have ties to a former Catfish!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: 18-year-old Telizza became bi-curious when her online friendship with Shai turned romantic. Frustrated by several failed attempts to video chat, Telizza has turned to Nev and Max to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: After months of sexting with a hot model he met on a hookup app, Marvin is eager to meet him in person. Max and sidekick, singer Chantal Claret, agree to help Marvin find his crush, but soon uncover more than they bargained for!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Max and co-host iO Tillett Wright help 18-year-old Mecca connect with the boy she's loved for the past 5 years. But when iO discovers that Mecca's digital beau may be using her pictures to catfish others, Mecca needs answers.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Nev and Max receive emails from opposite sides of the same online romance, each concerned that the other may be a catfish! The guys are taken aback when one side decides to follow through with their marriage plans!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Daisy & Marcus
programme.desc: Daisy met Marcus on Instagram and he instantly stole her heart. But Marcus won't speak to Daisy on the phone, let alone meet her in person, so Nev and Tyler try to arrange a face to face. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Prophet & Trinity
programme.desc: While Prophet, of Grammy-nominated Nappy Roots, is making his rap career comeback, he connected online with Trinity. Prophet's ready to settle down, but is this beauty too good to be true? (S4, ep13)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Esther & Theo
programme.desc: Esther's finally found her match in Theo. But he always refuses to video call. So it's up to Julia and Oobah to find out if Theo is who he says he is. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Felipe & Jasmine
programme.desc: Single father Felipe is ready to settle down with Jasmine. However, the two have been talking online for eight months and have never met. Max returns and joins Nev to investigate. (S4, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Trina & Scorpio
programme.desc: Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved? (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Artis & Jess
programme.desc: Five months ago Artis met Jess online. Artis and Jess each were in relationships, but believed they'd found true love. But is Jess everything that she says she is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Andria & David
programme.desc: David is the only love Andria has ever known. Love letters and voice messages make Andria stay. But having never met after 10 years, she needs to know what he is hiding that keeps him away. (S4, ep15)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sunny & Jamison
programme.desc: Sunny is in love with the man of her dreams. Jamison is a model, a TV writer, and also studying to be an anaesthesiologist. However, the pair have never met. Is Jamison too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Blaire & Markie
programme.desc: When Blaire's Instagram lover Markie broke her heart, she moved on. But now Markie is back and wants to meet. Blaire needs Nev and Max's help to make it happen and reveal Markie's secret. (S4, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Rob & Sarah
programme.desc: Oobah is joined by Nathan Henry to help Rob track down his soulmate, Sarah. After two and a half years, Sarah has suddenly gone quiet and it's up to Oobah and Nathan to investigate. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miracle & Javonni
programme.desc: Smart, single mum Miracle fell for Javonni, a dreamy-eyed Instagrammer. With Max on hiatus, Nev teams up with TV personality Charlamagne to take Miracle on a hunt for the man of her dreams. (S4, ep1)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kya & Alyx
programme.desc: In this episode we meet Kya and Alyx, who fell in love quickly after meeting online. Are they being honest with each other? Hosts Nev Schulman and Max Joseph investigate.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike & Kristen
programme.desc: Mike met Kristen on Facebook. They quickly forged a deep connection, but Mike's frequent efforts to meet Kristen have been futile. Will Mike finally get face-to-face with Kristen?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Anthony & Marq
programme.desc: Anthony is a war veteran who wears his heart on his sleeve. Over a year ago, he bonded online with a caring man named Marq. Today, they're head over heels in love - but what is Marq hiding?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike & Felicia
programme.desc: Mike and Felicia met online and soon hit it off. After agreeing to meet, Felicia stood Mike up, offering only thin excuses. Can Mike trust Felicia - or will he end up disappointed?

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Where's Ronnie?
programme.desc: Deena gets emotional at her baby shower, Mike and Lauren host their wedding rehearsal dinner, and Ronnie's personal woes create tension with the rest of the group.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Tuxedo Time

programme.desc: It's time for Mike and Lauren's wedding, but all eyes are on Ronnie's unpredictable girlfriend Jen when she makes the surprising decision to attend.

programme.desc: Jojo reveals that he loves his best friend, Sydney. Kristen wants to let her best friend Jeremiah know that she has a crush on him.

programme.title: The City: The Past Catches Up

programme.title: The City: Finale

programme.title: The City: Sleeping With The Frenemy
programme.desc: Olivia's working at ELLE Magazine, but meets her match in co-worker Erin Kaplan. Whitney returns to work for Kelly Cutrone, & an old friend's in town, looking to crash with her. (S1, ep14)

programme.title: The City: Working Girls
programme.desc: Whitney wonders if working with a friend is a good idea when Roxy steps out of line on day one. Olivia wins Joe Zee's approval on a new project at ELLE, but Erin isn't impressed. (S1, ep15)

programme.title: The Hills: Goodbye for Now / You Know What You Did
programme.desc: In this season finale, Heidi makes her final decision about moving in with Spencer. Lauren looks to Audrina to fill the void left by her best friend, and Whitney flies to New York. (S2, ep12)
programme.sub-title: Goodbye for Now / You Know What You Did

programme.title: The Hills: A Change of Plans
programme.desc: Lauren has to face her boss after the party. Meanwhile, Heidi doesn't take school seriously and makes different plans for her future. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in Spokane
programme.desc: A report that focuses on the murders in Spokane, Washington over a period of a little more than two years (1997 - 1999) of at least a dozen women, mostly prostitutes.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Jeffrey MacDonald: Fight for Truth
programme.desc: A report on the 1970 murders of U.S. Army Doctor Jeffrey MacDonald’s pregnant wife and two daughters at their Fort Bragg home. Having served 25 years in prison for the murders, MacDonald still proclaims his innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Taken: The Amber Dubois Story
programme.desc: A report on the February 2009 disappearance of Amber Dubois, just blocks from Escondido High School in California. 48 HOURS examines the permanent impact her disappearance has had on her family, even after the discovery and conviction of the murderer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in the Fast Lane
programme.desc: A report on the March 1988 murder of legendary racecar driver Mickey Thompson and his wife Trudy. Thompson’s sister is convinced that Michael Goodwin, her brother’s former partner, was the killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder at Sea?
programme.desc: The disappearance of newlywed George Smith, who vanished from a cruise in the Mediterranean. This report uncovers the questionable alibis, failed polygraphs and a provocative video that involves the three men who last saw Smith alive.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Texas Confidential
programme.desc: A report on the 1997 murder of Doris Angleton, the wife of a successful Houston, Texas bookie. Doris’ husband Bob who claimed that his brother Roger was Doris’ killer, was tried for the crime in state court and acquitted. But the case did not end there.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Body of Lies
programme.desc: In 2006, 31-year-old Leisha Hurst, while attending Barstow College, began dating fellow student, 34-year-old Jeami Chiapulis. Chiapulis seemed to be the man she could settle down with. The couple had plans to marry when Hurst vanished on January 22, 2009

programme.title: 48 Hours: Perfectly Executed - Part 1
programme.desc: A report on the 1994 murders of the Rafay family -- Sultana Rafay, her husband Tariq and their autistic daughter, Basma -- focusing on the pursuit and arrest of the two suspects: Atif Rafay, the only surviving family member, and his friend Sebastian Burns

programme.title: 48 Hours: Perfectly Executed - Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2 focuses on the role of the Canadian Mounted Police in the investigation and sting operation put in place to obtain confessions from Rafay and Burns. Having taken refuge in Canada, Rafay and Burns were extradited to Seattle to face murder charges.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Strange Life of Dr. Schwartz
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a beloved Florida doctor reveals his dark, secret past.
programme.sub-title: The Strange Life of Dr. Schwartz

programme.title: 48 Hours: To Catch a Stalker
programme.desc: Fifteen-year-old Penny Chang of Shaker Heights, Ohio was stalked and killed by her older brother’s best friend, 21-year-old Scott Strothers.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hollywood Secrets
programme.desc: The investigation into the 2008 murder of Juliana Redding, an aspiring actress and model and the subsequent trial. Redding was found dead in her Santa Monica, California home

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A defense team and cutting-edge forensic animators strategize to defend a young woman accused of murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A defense team and cutting-edge forensic animators strategize to defend a young woman accused of murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Tacoma Confidential
programme.desc: A report on corruption and a cover-up by city officials of Tacoma, Washington, focusing on David Brame, the city’s police chief who rose to power despite a shady past.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: In September 2002, two men were found executed in a burning Mercedes in an upscale Hollywood neighborhood. What initially looked like a drug-related murder, turned out to be something entirely different, but the crime scene left little evidence to go on.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Year We Disappeared
programme.desc: In August 1979, John Busby, a Falmouth, Massachusetts police officer, was ambushed in his car by a gunman in a passing car who shot him in the face. Although wounded, Busby was able to write a note for police at the scene that said “Not an accident.”

programme.title: 48 Hours: Deadly Ride
programme.desc: Jane Mixer, a student at the University of Michigan Law School in March of 1969, had just agreed to get married and had arranged a ride home to tell her parents. Her body was found in a small, rural cemetery just miles from her dorm.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Prisoners in Paradise
programme.desc: When Lois McMillen, a Connecticut artist was found dead on the British Virgin Island of Tortola in January 2000, four young American tourists were charged with her brutal murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Expert Witness
programme.desc: This report focuses on the use of expert witnesses in criminal trials and the problems that arise when their testimony is inaccurate or completely false.
