programme.title: The Love Boat: The Joker Is Mild / First Time Out / Take My Granddaughter, Please
programme.desc: In "The Joker is Mild," has-been comedian Barry Keyes (Phil Foster) abuses his family tie with cruise director Julie in an astonishing attempt to make a comeback.
programme.sub-title: The Joker Is Mild / First Time Out / Take My Granddaughter, Please

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Identical Problem / Julie's Old Flame / The Jinx
programme.desc: In "The Identical Problem," twins Helen and Ellen (both played by Diana "Soap" Canova) pretend to be one person, which nearly drives Doc crazy because Helen is warm, Ellen is cold and Doc is feeling amorous.
programme.sub-title: The Identical Problem / Julie's Old Flame / The Jinx

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Understudy / Married Singles / Lost & Found
programme.desc: A boy befriends a couple that recently lost its young son. A trainee schemes to steal Julie's job. A bickering married couple takes the cruise and stays in separate cabins...next door to each other.
programme.sub-title: The Understudy / Married Singles / Lost & Found

programme.title: The Love Boat: Romance Roulette / The Captain's Captain / Dog's Life
programme.desc: The presence of the captain's demanding father leaves the entire crew on edge. A dog traps a passenger in his cabin. Three friends reunite on board the ship and try to meet men through an unusual game. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Romance Roulette / The Captain's Captain / Dog's Life

programme.title: The Love Boat: Dear Beverly / The Strike / Special Delivery
programme.desc: An advice columnist neglects her husband to devote all her time to her fans, prompting him to seek affection elsewhere. A man with a negative history with Capt. Stubing fills in for the ailing chef.
programme.sub-title: Dear Beverly / The Strike / Special Delivery

programme.title: The Love Boat: Lonely At The Top / Silent Night / Divorce Me, Please
programme.desc: In a Christmas-themed cruise, the captain worries about how to effectively lead his ship but be a friend to his crew as well. A married couple who outwardly appear happy and in love are both desperate for the other person to give them a divorce.
programme.sub-title: Lonely At The Top / Silent Night / Divorce Me, Please

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Old Man And The Runaway / A Fine Romance / The Painters
programme.desc: A crotchety old man and a teenage runaway form an unlikely friendship. Julie grows frustrated when an old friend of her brother's repeatedly rejects her advances without explanation.
programme.sub-title: The Old Man And The Runaway / A Fine Romance / The Painters

programme.title: The Love Boat: Family Reunion / Cinderella Story / Too Hot To Handle
programme.desc: A woman who believes her departed dad was a noble sea captain forms an attachment for a devilish old purser; a newlywed couple are prevented by dislocated backs, sunburn, and even poison ivy from enjoying their honeymoon.
programme.sub-title: Family Reunion / Cinderella Story / Too Hot To Handle

programme.title: The Love Boat: Isaac's Double Standard / Chimpanzeeshines / One More Time
programme.desc: Isaac's possessive mother becomes jealous of her son's lady friend, while he objects to his mom sharing a cabin with her latest boyfriend; a divorced comedy team is too busy making jokes to admit they miss each other.
programme.sub-title: Isaac's Double Standard / Chimpanzeeshines / One More Time

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Caper / Eyes Of Love / Hollywood Royalty / Masquerade - Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: Millionaire superstars Roz and Bill (Michele Lee and Fernando Lamas) have remarried and are celebrating their newest honeymoon aboard the Pacific Princess in "Hollywood Royalty."
programme.sub-title: The Caper / Eyes Of Love / Hollywood Royalty / Masquerade - Parts 1 & 2

programme.title: The Love Boat: Winner Take Love / The Congressman Was Indiscreet / Isaac's History Lesson
programme.desc: A congressman unjustly accused of being involved in a scandal seeks refuge aboard the Pacific Princess; Isaac and a lovely intellectual snob clash over a colorful old passenger.
programme.sub-title: Winner Take Love / The Congressman Was Indiscreet / Isaac's History Lesson

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Last Of The Stubings / Million Dollar Man / The Sisters
programme.desc: Stubing's nephew comes on board to train to be a seaman but doesn't do a good job at anything he does.
programme.sub-title: The Last Of The Stubings / Million Dollar Man / The Sisters

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Inspector / A Very Special Girl / Until The Last Goodbye
programme.desc: The crew, after being informed that an inspector from the line will coming on board to do a report on them, but not knowing who he is, tries to be extra nice to anyone whom they think is the inspector but always comes up wrong.
programme.sub-title: The Inspector / A Very Special Girl / Until The Last Goodbye

programme.title: The Love Boat: Computerman / Memories Of You / Parlez Vous?
programme.desc: A slick computer matchmaker proceeds to pair up cruise guests while setting himself up with Julie; two American gold-diggers pretend to be French; a New York advertising executive meets up with a long-lost love. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Computerman / Memories Of You / Parlez Vous?

programme.title: The Love Boat: Taking Sides / Going By The Book / A Friendly Little Game
programme.desc: An older couple's problems affect the marriage of newlyweds.
programme.sub-title: Taking Sides / Going By The Book / A Friendly Little Game

programme.title: The Love Boat: Parents Know Best / A Selfless Love / The Nubile Nurse
programme.desc: A couple takes their son on a cruise in an attempt to end his relationship with an unsuitable girl; a May-December couple rethinks their romance; an ex-showgirl's glamorous past jeopardizes her new career as a registered nurse. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Parents Know Best / A Selfless Love / The Nubile Nurse

programme.title: The Love Boat: Musical Cabins
programme.desc: A young bachelor must marry within the week in order to claim a $3 million inheritance; a drab widow poses as a glamorous adventuress and captures the heart of the Captain.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Responsibly Yours
programme.desc: Sticking around for the long haul becomes a test of courage for Billy when he dates a hot single mother, while Jake and Sandy question whether they have more in common than a fondness for sex.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Burned
programme.desc: Rhonda makes it her mission to help Billy after he's attacked in South Central, while Jake has difficulty getting past old wounds when his mother suddenly appears at his birthday.

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Broken Promise
programme.desc: Sometimes bad thing happen to good people, and it's up to a rambunctious puppy and a friendly red-headed medical colleague named Kimberly to remind Jane and Michael what really matters.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Polluted Affairs
programme.desc: Alison dives into a steamy new relationship with a passionate environmentalist, but when she comes up for air, she discovers that he may not be all he seems.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Dreams Come True
programme.desc: Friendly concern is misconstrued as meddling when Billy confronts the married man Alison is seeing and Jake urges Matt to get revenge on the hoodlums that attacked him.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Drawing the Line
programme.desc: The Melrose group faces difficult new beginnings as Keith leaves his wife for Alison, Matt sees a lawyer about his discrimination case, and Rhonda takes on the challenge of finding a new roommate.

programme.title: Melrose Place: House Of God
programme.desc: Silence speaks volumes when an aloof new tenant, Jo Reynolds, moves in, and Jane and Michael suspect that their friend's wife is the victim of domestic abuse.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Whole Truth
programme.desc: Jake and Jo become closer. Michael and Jane are discussing trying to have a baby.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Jake VS Jake
programme.desc: Jake is emotionally unprepared when an old girlfriend announces he has a son, while Alison realizes she needs help in dealing with her serious medical problems.

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Melrose Place Christmas
programme.desc: Tis the season for surprises when Alison comes out of surgery with a romantic revelation and Michael makes his first baby delivery.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Single White Sister
programme.desc: Jake has accompanied Jo to the beach for a very early morning session picture- taking. They find an increasing attraction developing between them. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Melrose Place: Peanut Butter And Jealousy
programme.desc: Some relationships aren't made to last as Jo considers going back to her old marriage and Jane bursts at the seams over her sister's overly friendly behavior.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Picture Imperfect
programme.desc: Advertising gets a whole lot sexier when Alison gets an unexpected job promotion, Amanda Woodward comes on board as her boss, and Jo takes some very revealing shots for an underwear ad.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Three's A Crowd
programme.desc: Things heat up fast when Jake and Jo move their relationship to the next level, and Amanda is immediately attracted to Alison's roommate, Billy, after a game of Truth or Dare.

programme.title: Melrose Place: My New Partner
programme.desc: There's a little too much of mixing business and pleasure when Alison confronts Billy about his dates with Amanda, and Jo has an interesting solution to Jake's unemployment woes.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Bye Bye Billy
programme.desc: Alison is terrified when she's accosted after a theater performance, and her decision to find safety in Keith's arms has Billy packing his bags.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Irreconcilable Similarities
programme.desc: As both of their relationships take the fast track to commitment and compromise, Alison and Billy both begin to wonder if they're making the right move.

programme.title: Melrose Place: End Game
programme.desc: Billy is shaken by the sudden death of his father but is even more surprised when both Amanda and Alison show up at the funeral.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Test
programme.desc: It's a wicked game of "cat and mouse" when Alison begs Amanda for her old advertising job and Billy finds his padded resume gets him in more trouble than it's worth.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: After The Lovin'
programme.desc: Frustrated by his boss blaming him for burning his mouth on hot soup, Timmy has a special spoon created for Russell. Audrey's plan backfires when she tries to seduce Jeff in the bedroom in order to get him to complete household tasks.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Missed Connections
programme.desc: Timmy wants to reconnect with a woman he met on the subway; Jeff and Audrey turn on each other when former friends snub them.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Five Things
programme.desc: Jeff can't think of five nice things to say about Audrey; Russell encourages Timmy to serenade a woman; Jennifer and Adam mistakenly get Jeff and Audrey's bank statement.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Meat Wars
programme.desc: Audrey drags Jen to a Bon Jovi concert to prove that she's still young and fun, leaving Jeff and Adam at home. Russell finds a phone number in his pocket and asks Timmy to investigate.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Goodbye Dolly
programme.desc: Audrey tries to prepare for motherhood by continuing to repair a doll that she keeps damaging. Meanwhile, Jeff questions whether the very pregnant Brenda should be dating anymore, and Adam tries to convince Jennifer that he is a manly man.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Audrey's Shower
programme.desc: Jen puts the wrong date on the invitations to Audrey's baby shower, Jeff likes Audrey's maternity clothes, and Russell gives up women.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Liz Moves In
programme.desc: Liz temporarily moves in with Jeff and Audrey. Jeff isn't happy with the new guest, but changes his mind when he discovers Liz consistently takes his side against Audrey.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Taking Names
programme.desc: Jeff and Audrey realize that the names on their baby list are also the names of women that Russell has slept with. Adam becomes a cycling enthusiast after Jennifer suggests they start riding bikes in the park.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Cats & Dogs
programme.desc: Feeling lonely after her cat dies, Liz looks for a sperm donor. When Timmy's intellect and innocence don't attract his crush, he tries his hand at playing 'big dog.' Adam rips the vintage wedding dress that Jennifer's family sent her.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Cupcake
programme.desc: Russell gets jealous when Timmy manages to outshine him at his own pick-up game. Adam and Jennifer leave pot-laced cupcakes on the kitchen counter, and an unaware Jeff eats one.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Fountain Of Youth
programme.desc: After meeting up with college friends who are no longer into partying, Jeff and Audrey set out to prove that even with a baby on the way, they can still have fun. Meanwhile, Timmy attempts to find Russell's compassionate side.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Baby Talk
programme.desc: When Audrey bonds with their unborn baby by reading her stories, a paranoid Jeff believes that she is trying to form an alliance against him. Meanwhile, Russell steals an article that Timmy wrote.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Role Play
programme.desc: Jeff promises to take Audrey to an upmarket and very popular restaurant but forgets to book a table. Determined to dine there, he hatches a plan to get in by claiming that a last-minute reservation is needed for a celebrity.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Catering
programme.desc: Brenda enlists Jeff and Audrey's help when she does the catering for an event at Columbia University. While waitressing, Audrey tries to fit in with the guests, only to discover that they are more impressed with Jeff's bartending skills.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Cooking Class
programme.desc: The couples attempt to enjoy recreational cooking classes together, but Jeff and Adam can't keep their competitive nature out of the kitchen. Russell doesn't notice how disturbingly similar his new girlfriend is to Timmy.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Unpleasant Surprises
programme.desc: When Jennifer learns that the guys have nothing planned for Adam's last weekend as a bachelor, she plans a party weekend. Things don't go as planned, however, so Jeff, Russell, and Timmy must improvise.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Timmy Quits
programme.desc: Audrey has always had suspicions that Jeff's old college friend Heidi harbours romantic feelings for him, so Jeff invites Heidi over to prove that this was never the case.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: A Wee Problem
programme.desc: Jeff does his best to make a heavily pregnant Brenda laugh when he discovers that she has a `wee problem' due to her condition, but his antics cause her waters to break. Meanwhile, Adam annoys Audrey with his non-stop chatter during a spa visit.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: 100th
programme.desc: Brenda goes into labor on Jen and Adam's wedding day, but Jeff has reservations about being in the delivery room. Adam persuades Jen to make some alternative arrangements for their marriage ceremony.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Rules of Engagement: Pilot
programme.desc: Adam and Jennifer are a 20-something couple who have gotten engaged and moving in together after just seven months of dating. Meanwhile, their neighbors Jeff and Audrey who have been married for twelve years try to set a good example.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Birthday Deal
programme.desc: Though he's unhappy that Audrey spent more than usual for his birthday party, Jeff wants to stay on her good side to ensure he gets his yearly birthday deal. Though Jeff won't reveal the 'deal.'

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: After Adam has too many restless nights sleeping in Jennifer’s small bed, he brings home the bed he shared with his ex-girlfriend which causes a fight and leads them tossing out all memories of past relationships.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Hard Day's Night
programme.desc: Jennifer tries to help Jeff’s sore neck with a massage until the situation between them becomes uncomfortable and upsets Audrey. Meanwhile, Russell brings Adam along to help him fight off a school yard bully so Russell can get close to the teacher.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Kids
programme.desc: Adam and Jennifer’s plans for a romantic weekend fall apart after they argue about their different feelings toward careers, finances, and kids. Meanwhile, Audrey is having second thoughts about why she and Jeff have waited so long to have children.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Game on
programme.desc: After Adam buys an expensive video-game console, Jennifer makes him promise to discuss major purchases first, but Russell interferes and makes Adam question the agreement.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Jeff's Wooby
programme.desc: Audrey surprises Jeff by making quilt out of his old t-shirts but regrets her gift when he doesn't stop telling the stories that are behind the shirts.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Mr. Fix-It
programme.desc: Jeff and Audrey tackle marital communication issues while Adam and Jennifer discover whether creating a home-made 'videotape' will spice up their love life.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Flirting With Disaster
programme.desc: Adam enjoys stealing the attention of Russell's female admirers, prompting fiance Jennifer to lay down the law and Russell to seek revenge. Meanwhile, Jeff learns an important lesson about sleep deprivation.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Audrey's Sister
programme.desc: A surprise visit from Audrey's sister Barbara opens a window of opportunity for Russell to prove that beauty is more than what meets the eye - or at least a function of personality and good strategy.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Guy Code
programme.desc: In an effort to beef up their social agenda, Audrey persuades Jeff to double-date, which inadvertently puts the rules governed by the 'guy code' versus the 'marriage code' to the test.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Engagement Party
programme.desc: In an effort to capitalize on his commitment to Jennifer, Adam convinces Jeff to host an engagement party, which ultimately provides a lesson in 'giving' and 'receiving.' Audrey gains an unsolicited insight into her sister Barbara's single life.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Bag Ladies
programme.desc: Russell realizes the cost of dating a 'bag lady,' while Adam experiences the social peril of yielding to Jennifer's wishes and sporting a 'man bag.'

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Old School Jeff
programme.desc: Jeff is given an opportunity to 'live it up' during a night out on the town, landing Russell in hot water and Adam to reflect on the details surrounding his impending nuptials.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Fix-Ups and Downs
programme.desc: Jennifer and Audrey practice their match-making skills and inadvertently end up date-less while Adam and Jeff score financial gain in the process. Meanwhile, Russell tries a new tactic at 'fixing himself up.'

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: A Visit from Fay
programme.desc: A visit from Adam's free-spirited mother puts Jennifer's patience to the test and teaches Russell an embarrassing lesson about 'art'. Meanwhile, Jeff and Audrey find themselves enjoying alternative forms of entertainment.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Time Share
programme.desc: Jeff makes plans to take Audrey away for the weekend to a fancy hotel, even though they’ll have to sit through a time share presentation to get a great deal.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Jen at Work
programme.desc: Adam suggests that Jen do some freelance graphic design work for the company but Russell isn't crazy about the idea.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Optimal Male
programme.desc: Jeff's drive to be labeled an 'optimal male' on his life-insurance physical leads him to some extreme behavior, while Adam's over-friendliness with an ex-girlfriend unsettles Jennifer.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Hilda And Zelda: The Teenage Years
programme.desc: Aunts Hilda and Zelda experience growing pains when they turn into teenagers for the night.
programme.sub-title: Hilda And Zelda: The Teenage Years

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Mars Attracts
programme.desc: A winter vacation to Mars and a cute ski instructor test Sabrina’s feelings for Harvey.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: First Kiss
programme.desc: Sabrina’s first kiss becomes a test of true love when Harvey is turned into a frog.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sweet Charity
programme.desc: When Sabrina uses Libby’s likeness to promote a community service program, the real Libby manages to steal the limelight.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Cat Showdown
programme.desc: Salem enters a cat show to make some fast cash, but Sabrina uncovers a fur-raising scandal.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Meeting Dad’s Girlfriend
programme.desc: Love definitely isn’t in the air when Sabrina meets her dad’s new girlfriend.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: As Westbridge Turns
programme.desc: Sinister plots, tumultuous romance, danger, and intrigue – just another day at Westbridge High, after Sabrina casts a spell wishing for more excitement.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Great Mistake
programme.desc: Sabrina finds herself in a little trouble when she sneaks out of the house after being grounded.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Crucible
programme.desc: Sabrina is put on trial for witchcraft when her class visits historical Salem, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Troll Bride
programme.desc: When Sabrina is tricked into marrying a troll, only a prince – a.k.a. Harvey – can save her.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sabrina's 17th birthday turns stressful when she has to start studying for her witch's license.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 2)
programme.desc: Sabrina learns about the responsibilities that come with using magic when she earns her witch’s learner’s permit.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dummy For Love
programme.desc: Sabrina takes advantage of Vice Principal Kraft’s attraction to Aunt Hilda.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dante’s Inferno
programme.desc: Sabrina learns not to date outside of her realm after a bad evening with a witch boy.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: A Doll’s Story
programme.desc: Babysitting becomes a test of ingenuity when Sabrina’s bratty little cousin turns her into a doll.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Boy
programme.desc: The mysteries of men are revealed when Sabrina poses as a boy to figure out how they think.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: A River Of Candy Corn Runs Through It
programme.desc: Halloween is a scary night indeed when Sabrina and her aunts try to throw a normal party
programme.sub-title: A River Of Candy Corn Runs Through It

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Inna Gadda Sabrina
programme.desc: A time ball sends the town of Westbridge grooving back to the 1960s.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Witch Trash
programme.desc: A family feud erupts when hillbilly cousins (Loni Anderson and Alice Ghostley) arrive from the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: To Tell A Mortal
programme.desc: It’s Friday the 13th, and for one day only, Sabrina can tell her friends she’s a witch.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Oh What A Tangled Spell She Weaves
programme.desc: Sabrina’s lack of attention with detail causes bad side effects to her magic.
programme.sub-title: Oh What A Tangled Spell She Weaves

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Claus
programme.desc: A special visitor from the Other Realm helps Sabrina recapture the true spirit of Christmas

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Little Big Kraft
programme.desc: Tired of Mr. Kraft’s harsh rules, Sabrina concocts a potion to make him act like a teenager.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: 5 Easy Pieces Of Libby
programme.desc: Libby is even harder to figure out after Sabrina accidentally turns her into a jigsaw puzzle.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Finger Lickin’ Flu
programme.desc: Sabrina catches the flu in her pointing finger and accidentally transfers her magic to a teacher.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina & The Beanstalk
programme.desc: Sabrina’s beanstalk is right out of a fairytale, but it’s more like a nightmare for Harvey

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Roland the troll takes Valentine’s Day too far when he steals Sabrina’s heart.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Band Show
programme.desc: Egos soar out of control when Sabrina uses magic to become a rock star.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: My Nightmare The Car
programme.desc: A talking car causes Sabrina a big headache.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Quiz Show
programme.desc: Sabrina realizes the importance of her Quizmaster after she inadvertently gets him fired.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Fear Strikes Up A Conversation
programme.desc: Public speaking seems like a breeze for Sabrina after coming face-to-face with her fears in the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Rumor Mill
programme.desc: Gossip flies when Sabrina does witch community service in the Other Realm rumor mill.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: When Teens Collide
programme.desc: When Sabrina switches personalities with Libby, she uses her magic and newly found popularity.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Mom vs. Magic (Season Finale)
programme.desc: Sabrina faces the most difficult decision of her life when she must choose between her mom and her magic

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Disney World
programme.desc: A school trip to Disneyworld becomes yet another test for Sabrina on the road to her witch's license

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Choice
programme.desc: After her aunts decide to go their separate ways, Sabrina has to choose which of the two should raise her.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Boy Was My Face Red
programme.desc: An embarrassing moment leaves Sabrina red in the face.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: It’s a Mad Mad Mad Mad (Season Premiere)
programme.desc: Sabrina learns she has to solve the family secret before she can use her Witches License.
programme.sub-title: It’s a Mad Mad Mad Mad (Season Premiere)

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Suspicious Minds
programme.desc: Jealousy gets the best of Sabrina when Harvey and Libby are paired together for a school project.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Silencing Terry
programme.desc: Terry wants to demonstrate how Hollywood has used different objects to silence a gunshot.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Equalizing Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will test 3 scenes from Denzel Washington’s Equalizer films. Can Terry be as cool as Denzel?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Getting to Know Rick O'Shea
programme.desc: In this episode we get know Larry’s friend Rick O’Shea (Ricochet).

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Dying Hard
programme.desc: John McLain (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Good, The Bad and Terry
programme.desc: In this classic western, Clint Eastwood – aka “Blondie” – saves Eli Wallach from the hangman’s noose.
programme.sub-title: The Good, The Bad and Terry

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Shark Go Boom
programme.desc: In this iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs on to his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Breaking Terry Badly
programme.desc: Terry falls victim to Walter White in Breaking Bad, and Terry and Larry test 3 separate scenes from this iconic series.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Down Mexico Way
programme.desc: Don't mess with organized crime. The dynamic duo tackle scenes from the Mexico cartel series Queen of the South.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Saving Private Terry
programme.desc: Terry gets to relive part of his military carrier by attempting the famous sniper shot from Saving Private Ryan.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry's Brave Heart
programme.desc: Terry gets to annoy Larry with his impersonation of William Wallace from Braveheart.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Schappert Identity
programme.desc: Terry channels his inner Jason Bourne to test some of the best moments from the series of films.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry's Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry tackle the epic Lethal Weapon series testing 4 different scenes.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry and The Minigun
programme.desc: Can you really fire a GE Minigun handheld with ammunition held in a backpack (also seen on Captain America: Winter Soldier).

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Pay Terry Back
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test 2 scenes from Mel Gibson’s film Payback. Mel's character is in the back of a taxi when 4 bad guys pull up next to him in an SUV.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Reacher
programme.desc: We’re putting Jack Reacher to the test! The movie, the series, and the pie!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Harder Terry Falls
programme.desc: Dust off your chaps as Terry tests several things from the epic western The Harder They Fall, and a canteen buster test from Gunsmoke!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Ex-Men: The Origin of Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a famous scene from X-men. They are attempting to see if you can split a bullet with a Katana sword.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Schapbo
programme.desc: John Rambo’s ability to decimate enemies all by himself has created some of the most incredible weapon stunts in Hollywood history.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Punishing Larry
programme.desc: Grenades, propane tanks, and a bathtub, all adds up to some big tests of the popular comic book character.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry's Reindeer Game
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a scene from Reindeer Games when Ben Affleck and Charlize Theron get trapped under a frozen lake.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Across the Great Divided Lonesome Mighty River
programme.desc: Everybody loves a great western! Except Larry. Terry gets Larry to test more scenes from classic western movies!
programme.sub-title: Across the Great Divided Lonesome Mighty River

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Bond, Terry Bond
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be testing the effectiveness of driving a vehicle with fully automatic machine guns mounted to the car!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: RED-ish
programme.desc: Terry takes himself out of “retirement” to test some scenes from RED that will be extremely dangerous.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: S-Mart
programme.desc: Give me some sugar baby! Terry travels through time where he will test the cult favorite, Army of Darkness.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Leftovers Again?
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test things they never got to from other episodes. Pull up a chair and get ready for leftovers, and a surprise guest!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Scoreless
programme.desc: Using a unique method to crack a safe, Nick Wells (Robert De Niro) uses a blowtorch to cut through a safe, fill it with water.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Loves Action Movies
programme.desc: From Polar, to James Bond, to Lethal Weapon, Terry loves action movies and is putting some of the best ones to the test!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Meet the Smiths
programme.desc: Terry finally gets to compare himself to Brad Pitt!! Terry and Larry test 3 scenes from action film Mr. and Mrs. Smith.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Jean Claude Van Schappert
programme.desc: Terry enters the world of Slow-Mo and explosions trying to imitate Jean Claude in Hart Target.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Loves 70’s Cop Shows
programme.desc: Terry travels back in time to the 70’s where he gets to relive his childhood dreams of becoming a 70’s TV cop.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: We Hear Ya
programme.desc: Larry and Terry test several requests from viewers.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: D-Day By Air
programme.desc: Terry goes back to paratrooper school and will see how difficult it was for soldiers engaging the enemy while parachuting down to safety on D-Day.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: A Pirate’s Life for Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry go on a swashbuckling adventure when they test two scenes from the 1920’s film, The Black Pirate starring Douglas Fairbanks, Senior.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Nobody
programme.desc: We’re putting the action-packed film Nobody to the test. Booby Traps, Claymores and Riot shields make for an interesting day at the range.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Down Under
programme.desc: Terry and Larry start off the new season testing one of the most requested films, Quigley Down Under.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Paint Your Red River Stagecoach at High Noon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will test different famous shots from westerns. Can you shoot a cowboy hat off the bad guy?
programme.sub-title: Paint Your Red River Stagecoach at High Noon

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Larry's Shadow
programme.desc: Larry gets sucked into Terry’s dark and mysterious world because Terry wants to test 2 scenes from the 1994 film with Alec Baldwin, The Shadow.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Just-Terry-Fied
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be test 2 scenes from Justified where, Terry finds himself in a bathtub and a dead body lying over top of him.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Last Crusade of Indiana Terry
programme.desc: Terry channels his inner Dr. Jones and tests 1 scene from Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade containing 3 different tests.
programme.sub-title: The Last Crusade of Indiana Terry

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: All for One!
programme.desc: Terry travels back in time to see if he can make it as a Three Musketeer! Can he throw his sword and kill the enemy?

programme.title: The Challenge: Nehemiah's Last Day
programme.desc: Players become increasingly paranoid about being eliminated, the men and women partner up for a game of Throwback, and two guys have a betting war as they face off in the I Can duel.

programme.title: The Challenge: What Goes Around Comes Around
programme.desc: The players compete in the Rafty Race challenge, two women go head-to-head in an exhausting game of Push Me in The Duel, and a contender worries about her alliance's dwindling numbers.

programme.title: The Challenge: Until Next Time, Derrick
programme.desc: The players face off in a slippery Pole Dance challenge, two guys compete in a brutal round of Pole Wrestle in The Duel, and a competitor has a breakdown.

programme.title: The Challenge: Harsh Words
programme.desc: One person makes closed-minded comments about a competitor's identity, the players endure an eating contest and race during Dine-n-Dash, and two women face off in the Ascender duel.

programme.title: The Challenge: Friend or Foe?
programme.desc: The men and women partner up in the Stacking Stairs challenge, two friends compete in the Pole Wrestle duel, and a player moves in for a highly anticipated first kiss.

programme.title: The Challenge: Two for Two
programme.desc: The players go head-to-head in the Ice Breakers challenge, and one competitor is determined to step up her game as two women put their strength to the test in the Push Me duel.

programme.title: The Challenge: Fallen Alliances
programme.desc: The men and women team up for the difficult Sunken Treasure challenge, two guys go at it in the Ascender duel, and one player feels used by another competitor.

programme.title: The Challenge: The Big Split
programme.desc: The competitors must collect flags as they circle a 40-foot truss in the Around the Block challenge, a player goes back on her word, and two women head to The Duel to play I Can.

programme.title: The Challenge: The Final Four
programme.desc: The remaining players compete in Paddle Me, which guarantees two people a spot in the finals, and a double duel night of Push Me and I Can determines the other two contenders left standing.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Life-and-Death Struggle On the Rainbow Planet
programme.desc: The Mazone come attacking the Arcadia which has had too much free time lately.
programme.sub-title: The Life-and-Death Struggle On the Rainbow Planet

programme.title: Captain Harlock: My Friend, My Youth
programme.desc: While the Arcadia is being repaired at the dock of a Pirate Island, Tadashi and Tori-san come back with a pair of glasses.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Arcadia: The Secret Story of Its Construction
programme.desc: The Arcadia is rapidly being repaired on a Pirate Island while Lafresia continues her bloodthirsty hunt for it.
programme.sub-title: Arcadia: The Secret Story of Its Construction

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Call of the Star Flute
programme.desc: The Mazone plot to use Mayu to lure Harlock and the Arcadia to the Wind Planet and then attack with a powerful mine.
programme.sub-title: The Call of the Star Flute

programme.title: Captain Harlock: A Lone Man's Charge
programme.desc: Commander Kiruta learns of the existence of the Mazone and persistently tries to inform the Prime Minister of the impending doom.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: A Galactic Lullaby
programme.desc: The Arcadia is trapped due to an artificial gravity device.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Beautiful Mysterious Woman
programme.desc: After rescuing Mayu, all that remains is the final showdown with Lafresia.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Eve of the Showdown
programme.desc: The beautiful, dazzling Shizuka Namino becomes a bit of a celebrity on board the Arcadia after being rescued.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Tears On a Red Sweater
programme.desc: Upon realizing that Harlock knew who Shizuka's real identity is, she deems that she has failed in her mission.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Farewell! Mayu
programme.desc: The invasion Mazone forces finally begin their attack on Earth.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Heroic! The Commander Dies
programme.desc: The Arcadia leaves for space with Kiruta on board, after he was injured while trying to save Mayu.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Then, The Angels Sang
programme.desc: After a bunch of skirmishes, the true battle finally begins.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Duel! The Queen VS. Harlock
programme.desc: Making its way past countless gunshots, the Arcadia finally arrives at Queen Lafresia's flagship.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Farewell, Space Outlaw
programme.desc: Harlock and his crew go for their triumphant return to Earth, but, all that awaits them is an order that they've been banished from Earth.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Departure Ballad
programme.desc: On the road to Megalopolis, Tetsuro is encountered by Count Mecha and watches as his mother is killed.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Red Winds of Mars
programme.desc: The capital of Mars, Great Syrtis. It is a deserted planet with nothing but the blowing of the red winds.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Titan's Sleeping Warrior
programme.desc: Tetsuro is rescued from a ghost by Claire, a waitress they met. But in doing so, Claire is blasted into a million pieces.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Great Bandit Antares
programme.desc: The great bandit Antares hijacks the 999 and takes Tetsuro and the gang hostage as he forces them to make an unplanned stop at his home.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Shadow of the Planet of Indecision
programme.desc: Pluto, the resting place for the bodies of those who have replaced their human bodies with mechanical ones.
programme.sub-title: Shadow of the Planet of Indecision

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Comet Library
programme.desc: Tetsuro arrives at the nest of Comets, Comet Station, and is shocked at its lack of vertical scope.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Graveyard at the Bottom of Gravity - Part One
programme.desc: The 999 spirals downward to the bottom of gravity. They enter into the 333, which had previously crashed in there, only to find that hundreds of years appear to have passed by!
programme.sub-title: The Graveyard at the Bottom of Gravity - Part One

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Graveyard at the Bottom of Gravity  Part Two
programme.desc: Continuing the plot, we find out that Ryuz is a depressed woman who was betrayed by the man she loved while she was transforming her body for him.
programme.sub-title: The Graveyard at the Bottom of Gravity  Part Two

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Trader Junction  Part One
programme.desc: Trader Junction, a crossroads for the Galaxy Railways. Surrounding the station are countless desolate travelers with nothing more to do but wait.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Trader Junction  Part Two
programme.desc: Tetsuro foolishly falls asleep and is taken by Hanako aboard the train bound for Wildflower Station. He is introduced to Hanako's elderly parents as her fiancé.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Formless Planet Nuruba
programme.desc: On the planet without a form, Nuruba, Tetsuro and Maetel are ambushed by its citizens for their bodies and their clothes are stolen.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Fossilized Warrior  Part One
programme.desc: The 999 has to make an emergency stop at Fossilized Planet, a place petrified all the way to the tracks. Tetsuro is curious about the fossils and leaves the 999.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Fossilized Warrior  Part Two
programme.desc: Tetsuro rescues the fossilized warrior from a gang of thieves. However, the warrior runs off with Tetsuro's pass. He attempts to leave on the 999 along with the fossil of his lover, Lidya.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Laala from the Double Planet
programme.desc: Perfect Mechanization, a planet where all its inhabitants have taken on mechanical bodies. All its people look down upon flesh-and-blood humans.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Water Kingdom - Beethoven
programme.desc: On the Black Knight's Planet, Tetsuro is invited to live together with the Black Knight. When Tetsuro refuses, he frantically throws his lance at him! Maetel jumps to the rescue but he's his by the lance!

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Town of Fireflies
programme.desc: On the planet where people have the ability to glow, Tetsuro meets a struggling aspiring animation director named Fraiya. Tetsuro feels lousy after she rejects his offer to give her money.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Armored Planet
programme.desc: On a planet where all living things are covered in hard armor, Maetel is hit by an armored bug and is seriously injured.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Maetel of Mud
programme.desc: In the Mud Capitol, a city where the rain never stops, Tetsuro receives a phone call from a woman and is dragged out into the mud.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Kingdom of Atonement
programme.desc: In The Kingdom of Atonement, a town famous for its sanitation, the conductor is attacked by a mugger on his day off! Tetsuro and Maetel console him.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Souls of Professionals
programme.desc: On Professional, the planet of memories, Tetsuro ignores Maetel's advice, and makes eye contact with a professional hangman.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Tombstone of Dead Leave
programme.desc: The inside of Ballera has become hollow. Tetsuro and Maetel are swimming around in the air when they're attacked by some cowboys and it causes a big commotion.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Nick and Jo risk one last supply to a remote settlement as the wet season looms.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Robbie and Ashleigh hit house removal hell on a mud-bogged mission out of Brisbane.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame and his faithful canine companion Bella take a monster load cross-country.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Sludge wrestles flooded roads to deliver fuel to farmers.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Yogi risks a showdown with the law as he heads into south Australia.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Yogi prepares for a showdown with transport police in South Australia.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A Perth heavy haulage crew moves a huge pedestrian bridge.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve battles flooded highways when his truck breaks down, leaving him stranded.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A leaky fridge halts Woody's urgent frozen food delivery.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A delicate rescue operation to recover a 70-year-old World War II bomber.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Kelly must transport 40 tonnes of grapes to a winery before they start fermenting.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Torrential rain plays havoc with Robbie Mackay's efforts to relocate a home.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A cyclone threatens a tanker driver's delivery of hazardous chemicals to a mine site.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Richo owns a fleet of monster trucks that he has to get halfway across the continent.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: In Perth, Steve Grahame is preparing for an epic journey.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark King has to haul a monster rig to a coal mine 700km away.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Dougal Brett's road trains have to haul 1,500 cattle to a market nearly 3,000km away.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A team of truckers, husband and wife Mark and Clare Bolitho, bring their 16-year-old dog all the way to Adelaide; tensions rise at a Perth freight depot.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Isolated community in Australia gets over $3 million worth of power-generating equipment.

programme.title: MTV Spankin' New
programme.desc: You hear it first! MTV SPANKIN’ NEW is the place to discover new artists before they become household names. It’s the ultimate music experience to stay ahead of the trends.

programme.title: StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew
programme.desc: Class is now in session. Go back to school with your personal astrophysicist, Neil deGrasse Tyson, in this special marathon that explores everyday scientific topics from airplanes and telescopes to wind and space.
programme.sub-title: Things you thought you knew S1 back to school special

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries
programme.desc: Join Dr. Arielle Johnson, Neil deGrasse Tyson, and a co-host as they discuss fermentation and how it works.

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson and a panel of co-hosts and experts talk all about data science and machine learning.
programme.sub-title: Rise of the Machines with Matt Ginsberg

programme.title: StarTalk With Neil deGrasse Tyson
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson, Gary O'Reilly and Chuck Nice investigate the use of AI and machine learning to predict and understand sports with mathematician and author Matt Ginsberg.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Natural
programme.desc: Tia rearranges her class schedule in order to spend more time with the school "stud"; Tamera is tapped to pitch a big softball game

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Break-Up
programme.desc: Lisa decides it's time to "dump" Terrence and forbids Ray from hanging out with him, while Roger tries to pick which twin to "woo."

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Tutor
programme.desc: When a high school football star needs a tutor, Tamera pretends to be Tia so she can teach him a special lesson in "chemistry"!

programme.title: Sister, Sister: History A La Cart
programme.desc: An embarrassing arrest from his college days comes back to haunt Ray, and Lisa turns an inheritance into a shopping spree

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Grandpa Campbell
programme.desc: When Ray's ne'er-do-well father comes for a visit, he turns the household upside-down -- and turns Tamera into a ruthless businesswoman!

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Twins Get Fired
programme.desc: When Tia becomes Tamera's new boss at Rocket Burger, they both learn a lesson in responsibility

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Halloween
programme.desc: While the twins go in search of a Halloween rave, Lisa and Ray attend a fancy party thrown by a prospective client.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Weird Science
programme.desc: Tia and Tamera think they're in for a "free ride" when Ray starts dating their science teacher.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Thanksgiving in Hawaii (Part I)
programme.desc: When Ray and Lisa take the girls to Hawaii for Thanksgiving, they're forced to share their condo with their "exes," who have begun dating each other.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Thanksgiving in Hawaii (Part II)
programme.desc: While Ray and Lisa frantically search for the twins, who are missing in Hawaii, Roger opens the Campbell/Landry home to hobos for Thanksgiving dinner.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Private School
programme.desc: The prospect of Tia's attending a prestigious prep school puts social pressure on Tia and financial pressure on Lisa.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Christmas
programme.desc: When a loan shark comes after Ray's father for a bad debt, the family comes to his rescue.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Double Double Date
programme.desc: The twins find themselves in double trouble when they switch identities and Tia winds up with two dates for the same party.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Reality Really Bites
programme.desc: For her film class, Tia "spices up" her family documentary by throwing all sorts of monkey wrenches into their lives.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Volunteers
programme.desc: While volunteering at a local retirement home, Tamera becomes determined to help a grumpy old man find happiness again.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Valentine's Day finds Tamera trying to "steal back" her hot date, and Ray and Lisa wondering if the other person is in love with them.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Paper or Plastic?
programme.desc: Tamera crosses the picket lines to work at a supermarket, but soon realizes that being a "scab" isn't all it's cracked up to be.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Piano Lesson
programme.desc: Ray learns a "noteworthy" lesson in honesty when he "fibs" and tells a tone-deaf Tamera that she plays the piano well, and she winds up humiliating herself at a piano recital.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Summer Bummer
programme.desc: Tia and Tamera trade places so that Tia can be with a cute guy in summer school and Tamera can "goof off" by taking Tia's spot as a camp counselor.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Candidate
programme.desc: Tamera learns how much she needs Tia's help when she runs for class president.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Big Twin on Campus
programme.desc: When Tia poses as a college student to impress her older boyfriend, Tamera goes to great lengths to fit in with Tia's new circle of "mature" friends.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Audition
programme.desc: Tamera's budding career as a lowdown blues singer is threatened when she gets "too happy" after her dream date asks her out!

programme.title: Sister, Sister: When a Man Loves Two Women

programme.sub-title: When a Man Loves Two Women

programme.title: Sister, Sister: You Are So Beautiful
programme.desc: Curiosity about their birth parents leads the twins, Ray, and Lisa on a quest to learn more about the girls' past.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Gimme a Brake

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Daddys Girl

programme.desc: In a bid to boost their popularity at school, the twins try out for the cheerleading squad -- and Ray tries his hand at coaching them.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Kid-Napped
programme.desc: When a new girl in school threatens Tia and Tamera's popularity, the twins join forces to win back their friends with the help of a music superstar.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Boy From the Hood
programme.desc: Tamera falls for Tia's childhood friend Darnell, who's all grown up and running with a fast crowd.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: I'll be There
programme.desc: Tia takes a job in a '50s diner to get away from Tamera and is shocked when Tamera starts working there, too.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Ch-Ch-Ch-Changes
programme.desc: The twins are thrilled when Ray and Lisa decide to take their relationship to a more romantic level, but have second thoughts when Roger outlines the downsides of their parents dating.

programme.desc: When Tia poses for Tamera's class picture, the gorgeous photo that results makes Tamera extremely popular, and Tia extremely resentful.

programme.desc: Determined to make the school's all-male hockey team, Tia and Tamera must disguise themselves as boys and pretend they're just two of the guys!

programme.desc: Ray feels left out by the close bond Tamera forms with her new music teacher.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Little Man Date

programme.desc: A ski trip designed to give the twins some independence from their parents has them longing for the comforts of home after they're trapped in an avalanche.

programme.desc: Lisa gets a new job in the high school cafeteria, but her outrageous behavior proves to be a major embarrassment to Tia.

programme.desc: Dateless Tamera feels like a third wheel when Tia and Roger get matched up on Valentine's Day.
